lsofиҫ“еҮәеҗ„еҲ—дҝЎжҒҜзҡ„ж„Ҹд№үеҰӮдёӢпјҡCOMMANDпјҡиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„еҗҚз§° PIDпјҡиҝӣзЁӢж ҮиҜҶз¬Ұ USERпјҡиҝӣзЁӢжүҖжңүиҖ… FDпјҡж–Үд»¶жҸҸиҝ°з¬ҰпјҢеә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸйҖҡиҝҮж–Үд»¶жҸҸиҝ°з¬ҰиҜҶеҲ«иҜҘж–Үд»¶гҖӮеҰӮcwdгҖҒtxtзӯү TYPEпјҡж–Үд»¶зұ»еһӢпјҢеҰӮDIRгҖҒREGзӯү DEVICEпјҡжҢҮе®ҡзЈҒзӣҳзҡ„еҗҚз§° SIZEпјҡж–Үд»¶зҡ„еӨ§е°Ҹ NODEпјҡзҙўеј•иҠӮзӮ№пјҲж–Үд»¶еңЁзЈҒзӣҳдёҠзҡ„ж ҮиҜҶпјү NAMEпјҡжү“ејҖж–Үд»¶зҡ„зЎ®еҲҮеҗҚз§° lsof which httpd //йӮЈдёӘиҝӣзЁӢеңЁдҪҝз”Ёapacheзҡ„еҸҜжү§иЎҢж–Үд»¶ lsof /etc/passwd //йӮЈдёӘиҝӣзЁӢеңЁеҚ з”Ё/etc/passwd lsof /dev/hda6 //йӮЈдёӘиҝӣзЁӢеңЁеҚ з”Ёhda6 lsof /dev/cdrom //йӮЈдёӘиҝӣзЁӢеңЁеҚ з”Ёе…үй©ұ lsof -c sendmail //жҹҘзңӢsendmailиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„ж–Үд»¶дҪҝз”Ёжғ…еҶө lsof -c courier -u ^zahn //жҳҫзӨәеҮәйӮЈдәӣж–Үд»¶иў«д»Ҙcourierжү“еӨҙзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢжү“ејҖпјҢдҪҶжҳҜе№¶дёҚеұһдәҺз”ЁжҲ·zahn lsof -p 30297 //жҳҫзӨәйӮЈдәӣж–Үд»¶иў«pidдёә30297зҡ„иҝӣзЁӢжү“ејҖ lsof -D /tmp жҳҫзӨәжүҖжңүеңЁ/tmpж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӯжү“ејҖзҡ„instanceе’Ңж–Үд»¶зҡ„иҝӣзЁӢгҖӮдҪҶжҳҜsymbolж–Үд»¶е№¶дёҚеңЁеҲ— lsof -u1000 //жҹҘзңӢuidжҳҜ100зҡ„з”ЁжҲ·зҡ„иҝӣзЁӢзҡ„ж–Үд»¶дҪҝз”Ёжғ…еҶө lsof -utony //жҹҘзңӢз”ЁжҲ·tonyзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢзҡ„ж–Үд»¶дҪҝз”Ёжғ…еҶө lsof -u^tony //жҹҘзңӢдёҚжҳҜз”ЁжҲ·tonyзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢзҡ„ж–Үд»¶дҪҝз”Ёжғ…еҶө(^жҳҜеҸ–еҸҚзҡ„ж„ҸжҖқ) lsof -i //жҳҫзӨәжүҖжңүжү“ејҖзҡ„з«ҜеҸЈ lsof -i:80 //жҳҫзӨәжүҖжңүжү“ејҖ80з«ҜеҸЈзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢ lsof -i -U //жҳҫзӨәжүҖжңүжү“ејҖзҡ„з«ҜеҸЈе’ҢUNIX domainж–Үд»¶ lsof -i UDP@[url]www.akadia.com:123 //жҳҫзӨәйӮЈдәӣиҝӣзЁӢжү“ејҖдәҶеҲ°www.akadia.comзҡ„UDPзҡ„123(ntp)з«ҜеҸЈзҡ„й“ҫжҺҘ lsof -i tcp@ohaha.ks.edu.tw:ftp -r //дёҚж–ӯжҹҘзңӢзӣ®еүҚftpиҝһжҺҘзҡ„жғ…еҶө(-rпјҢlsofдјҡж°ёиҝңдёҚж–ӯзҡ„жү§иЎҢпјҢзӣҙеҲ°ж”¶еҲ°дёӯж–ӯдҝЎеҸ·,+rпјҢlsofдјҡдёҖзӣҙжү§иЎҢпјҢзӣҙеҲ°жІЎжңүжЎЈжЎҲиў«жҳҫзӨә,зјәзңҒжҳҜ15sеҲ·ж–°) lsof -i tcp@ohaha.ks.edu.tw:ftp -n //lsof -n дёҚе°ҶIPиҪ¬жҚўдёәhostnameпјҢзјәзңҒжҳҜдёҚеҠ дёҠ-nеҸӮж•°

posts.title: Sublime Text зҡ„дёҖдәӣеҝ«жҚ·й”®
posts.excerpt: Sublime Text зҡ„дёҖдәӣеҝ«жҚ·й”®
posts.text: Sublime Text зҡ„дёҖдәӣеҝ«жҚ·й”® 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869Ctrl+D йҖүиҜҚ пјҲеҸҚеӨҚжҢүеҝ«жҚ·й”®пјҢеҚіеҸҜз»§з»ӯеҗ‘дёӢеҗҢж—¶йҖүдёӯдёӢдёҖдёӘзӣёеҗҢзҡ„ж–Үжң¬иҝӣиЎҢеҗҢж—¶зј–иҫ‘пјүCtrl+G и·іиҪ¬еҲ°зӣёеә”зҡ„иЎҢCtrl+J еҗҲе№¶иЎҢпјҲе·ІйҖүжӢ©йңҖиҰҒеҗҲе№¶зҡ„еӨҡиЎҢж—¶пјүCtrl+L йҖүжӢ©ж•ҙиЎҢпјҲжҢүдҪҸ-з»§з»ӯйҖүжӢ©дёӢиЎҢпјүCtrl+M е…үж Үз§»еҠЁиҮіжӢ¬еҸ·еҶ…ејҖе§ӢжҲ–з»“жқҹзҡ„дҪҚзҪ®Ctrl+T иҜҚдә’жҚўCtrl+U иҪҜж’Өй”ҖCtrl+P жҹҘжүҫеҪ“еүҚйЎ№зӣ®дёӯзҡ„ж–Үд»¶е’Ңеҝ«йҖҹжҗңзҙўпјӣиҫ“е…Ҙ @ жҹҘжүҫж–Үд»¶дё»ж Үйўҳ/еҮҪж•°пјӣжҲ–иҖ…иҫ“е…Ҙ : и·іиҪ¬еҲ°ж–Үд»¶жҹҗиЎҢпјӣCtrl+R еҝ«йҖҹеҲ—еҮә/и·іиҪ¬еҲ°жҹҗдёӘеҮҪж•°Ctrl+K Backspace д»Һе…үж ҮеӨ„еҲ йҷӨиҮіиЎҢйҰ–Ctrl+K+B ејҖеҗҜ/е…ій—ӯдҫ§иҫ№ж ҸCtrl+KK д»Һе…үж ҮеӨ„еҲ йҷӨиҮіиЎҢе°ҫCtrl+K+T жҠҳеҸ еұһжҖ§Ctrl+K+U ж”№дёәеӨ§еҶҷCtrl+K+L ж”№дёәе°ҸеҶҷCtrl+K+0 еұ•ејҖжүҖжңүCtrl+Enter жҸ’е…ҘиЎҢеҗҺпјҲеҝ«йҖҹжҚўиЎҢпјүCtrl+Tab еҪ“еүҚзӘ—еҸЈдёӯзҡ„ж ҮзӯҫйЎөеҲҮжҚўCtrl+Shift+A йҖүжӢ©е…үж ҮдҪҚзҪ®зҲ¶ж ҮзӯҫеҜ№е„ҝCtrl+Shift+D еӨҚеҲ¶е…үж ҮжүҖеңЁж•ҙиЎҢпјҢжҸ’е…ҘеңЁиҜҘиЎҢд№ӢеүҚctrl+shift+F еңЁж–Үд»¶еӨ№еҶ…жҹҘжүҫпјҢдёҺжҷ®йҖҡзј–иҫ‘еҷЁдёҚеҗҢзҡ„ең°ж–№жҳҜsublimeе…Ғи®ёж·»еҠ еӨҡдёӘж–Үд»¶еӨ№иҝӣиЎҢжҹҘжүҫCtrl+Shift+K еҲ йҷӨж•ҙиЎҢCtrl+Shift+L йј ж ҮйҖүдёӯеӨҡиЎҢпјҲжҢүдёӢеҝ«жҚ·й”®пјүпјҢеҚіеҸҜеҗҢж—¶зј–иҫ‘иҝҷдәӣиЎҢCtrl+Shift+M йҖүжӢ©жӢ¬еҸ·еҶ…зҡ„еҶ…е®№пјҲжҢүдҪҸ-з»§з»ӯйҖүжӢ©зҲ¶жӢ¬еҸ·пјүCtrl+Shift+P жү“ејҖе‘Ҫд»ӨйқўжқҝCtrl+Shift+/ жіЁйҮҠе·ІйҖүжӢ©еҶ…е®№Ctrl+Shift+вҶ‘еҸҜд»Ҙз§»еҠЁжӯӨиЎҢд»Јз ҒпјҢдёҺдёҠиЎҢдә’жҚўCtrl+Shift+вҶ“еҸҜд»Ҙз§»еҠЁжӯӨиЎҢд»Јз ҒпјҢдёҺдёӢиЎҢдә’жҚўCtrl+Shift+[ жҠҳеҸ д»Јз ҒCtrl+Shift+] еұ•ејҖд»Јз ҒCtrl+Shift+Enter е…үж ҮеүҚжҸ’е…ҘиЎҢCtrl+PageDown гҖҒCtrl+PageUp ж–Үд»¶жҢүејҖеҗҜзҡ„еүҚеҗҺйЎәеәҸеҲҮжҚўCtrl+Z ж’Өй”ҖCtrl+Y жҒўеӨҚж’Өй”ҖCtrl+F2 и®ҫзҪ®/еҸ–ж¶Ҳд№ҰзӯҫCtrl+/ жіЁйҮҠж•ҙиЎҢпјҲеҰӮе·ІйҖүжӢ©еҶ…е®№пјҢеҗҢвҖңCtrl+Shift+/вҖқж•ҲжһңпјүCtrl+йј ж Үе·Ұй”® еҸҜд»ҘеҗҢж—¶йҖүжӢ©иҰҒзј–иҫ‘зҡ„еӨҡеӨ„ж–Үжң¬Shift+йј ж ҮеҸій”®пјҲжҲ–дҪҝз”Ёйј ж Үдёӯй”®пјүеҸҜд»Ҙз”Ёйј ж ҮиҝӣиЎҢз«–еҗ‘еӨҡиЎҢйҖүжӢ©Shift+F2 дёҠдёҖдёӘд№ҰзӯҫShift+Tab еҺ»йҷӨзј©иҝӣAlt+Shift+1пјҲйқһе°Ҹй”®зӣҳпјүзӘ—еҸЈеҲҶеұҸпјҢжҒўеӨҚй»ҳи®Ө1еұҸAlt+Shift+2 е·ҰеҸіеҲҶеұҸ-2еҲ—Alt+Shift+3 е·ҰеҸіеҲҶеұҸ-3еҲ—Alt+Shift+4 е·ҰеҸіеҲҶеұҸ-4еҲ—Alt+Shift+5 зӯүеҲҶ4еұҸAlt+Shift+8 еһӮзӣҙеҲҶеұҸ-2еұҸAlt+Shift+9 еһӮзӣҙеҲҶеұҸ-3еұҸCtrl+Shift+еҲҶеұҸеәҸеҸ· е°ҶеҪ“еүҚз„ҰзӮ№йЎөеҲҶй…ҚеҲ°еҲҶеұҸеәҸеҸ·йЎөAlt+. й—ӯеҗҲеҪ“еүҚж ҮзӯҫAlt+F3 йҖүдёӯж–Үжң¬жҢүдёӢеҝ«жҚ·й”®пјҢеҚіеҸҜдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§йҖүжӢ©е…ЁйғЁзҡ„зӣёеҗҢж–Үжң¬иҝӣиЎҢеҗҢж—¶зј–иҫ‘Tab зј©иҝӣ иҮӘеҠЁе®ҢжҲҗF2 дёӢдёҖдёӘд№ҰзӯҫF6 жЈҖжөӢиҜӯжі•й”ҷиҜҜF9 иЎҢжҺ’еәҸ(жҢүa-z)F11 е…ЁеұҸжЁЎејҸ

posts.title: Sublime Text 3 зҡ„дёҖдәӣеёёз”ЁжҸ’д»¶
posts.excerpt: Sublime Text 3 зҡ„дёҖдәӣеёёз”ЁжҸ’д»¶[TOC] AdministrativeThese plugins are kind of вҖҳmetaвҖҷ because they are not concerned with writing code. Package ControlThis package enables you to install other packages. Since build 3124, you can install it within Sublime via Tools вһЎ Install Package Control. AdvancedNewFileA better way to create new files. For instance, it automatically creates a folder when needed. SideBarEnhacementsAdds features such as renaming to the sidebar. A File IconAdd icons to the files in the sidebar. ProjectManagerOrganizing project files by putting them in a central location. TodoReviewScans files for TODOs and more. FindKeyConflictsKey conflicts are inevitably when you use a lot of plugins. Editor ConfigMaintain consistent coding styles between different editors. Sync SettingsKeep settings in sync via Github-Gist.
posts.text: Sublime Text 3 зҡ„дёҖдәӣеёёз”ЁжҸ’д»¶[TOC] AdministrativeThese plugins are kind of вҖҳmetaвҖҷ because they are not concerned with writing code. Package ControlThis package enables you to install other packages. Since build 3124, you can install it within Sublime via Tools вһЎ Install Package Control. AdvancedNewFileA better way to create new files. For instance, it automatically creates a folder when needed. SideBarEnhacementsAdds features such as renaming to the sidebar. A File IconAdd icons to the files in the sidebar. ProjectManagerOrganizing project files by putting them in a central location. TodoReviewScans files for TODOs and more. FindKeyConflictsKey conflicts are inevitably when you use a lot of plugins. Editor ConfigMaintain consistent coding styles between different editors. Sync SettingsKeep settings in sync via Github-Gist. GeneralUseful for all languages. All CompleteIndexes all open files for auto-completion. BracketHighlighterImproves the already built-in highlighting. TerminalOpen Terminal with current working directory set to the directory of the open file on a hot key. AlignTabAlign your code by :, =, =>, %, ,,| or your own RegEx. GitGutterDisplays changes in the gutter (left to the line numbers). GitIncludes some git commands into Sublime. GitSavvyFull git and GitHub integration. GitignoreFetches templates for the .gitignore provided by Github. DashDocOpen current selection in Dash on a hot key. Local HistoryKeep a local history of your files. Even though I use git on almost every project, I still donвҖҷt commit every change. It gives a better feeling to have the possibility to go back to every change. Javascript Tern for SublimeStatic Javascript code analyzer with auto-completion, function argument hints, вҖҳgo to definitionвҖҷ and more. The installation and configuration can be a little bit tricky but itвҖҷs worth it. Choose Tern over SublimeCodeIntel (unmaintained) and JavaScript Completions (buggy). JavaScript & NodeJS Snippets Console WrapFast way to log to console. JsPrettierIntegration of Prettier, the opinionated JavaScript formatter. BabelSyntax definitions for ES6 JavaScript with React JSX extensions. TypeScript Elm Language Support HTML & CSS SassSass is a preprocessor extending CSS and this plugins adds the language support. SassSolutionsAuto-complete variables/mixins from your вҖҳsettings.scssвҖҷ file. CSS3Replaces the built-in CSS support with a more up-to-date information. Includes cssnext support. Follow the instructions to reduce misbehaviour with other plugins. EmmetAllows you to write HTML very fast. You have to learn their way though. Color Highlighter Linter SublimeLinter SublimeLinter-HTML-tidy SublimeLinter-contrib-stylelintFor CSS. Choose stylelint over SublimeLinter-CSSlint. SublimeLinter-contrib-SCSS-lint SublimeLinter-contrib-ESLint SublimeLinter-flow SublimeLinter-contrib-elm-make SublimeLinter-JSON Other omniMarkupPreviewerдҪҝз”Ё ctrl+alt+oжү“ејҖжөҸи§ҲеҷЁе®һж—¶йў„и§Ҳ

posts.title: nodejsе®үиЈ…
posts.excerpt: NodeJS е®үиЈ…й…ҚзҪ®ж·ҳе®қnpmеӣҪеҶ…и®ҝй—®еӨ–зҪ‘жҳҜеҫҲж…ўзҡ„пјҢе®үиЈ…NodeJSжҳҜиҮӘеёҰзҡ„npmең°еқҖй»ҳи®ӨжҳҜпјҡhttp://registry.npmjs.orgпјҢи®ҝй—®еҫҲж…ўпјҢжүҖд»ҘдёҖиҲ¬жҚўжҲҗеӣҪеҶ…зҡ„ең°еқҖгҖӮ йҖҡиҝҮconfigе‘Ҫд»Ө 12npm config set registry http://registry.cnpmjs.org npm info underscore#пјҲеҰӮжһңй…ҚзҪ®жҲҗеҠҹпјҢиҝҷдёӘе‘Ҫд»Өдјҡжңүеӯ—з¬ҰдёІresponseпјү
posts.text:
NodeJS е®үиЈ…й…ҚзҪ®ж·ҳе®қnpmеӣҪеҶ…и®ҝй—®еӨ–зҪ‘жҳҜеҫҲж…ўзҡ„пјҢе®үиЈ…NodeJSжҳҜиҮӘеёҰзҡ„npmең°еқҖй»ҳи®ӨжҳҜпјҡhttp://registry.npmjs.orgпјҢи®ҝй—®еҫҲж…ўпјҢжүҖд»ҘдёҖиҲ¬жҚўжҲҗеӣҪеҶ…зҡ„ең°еқҖгҖӮ йҖҡиҝҮconfigе‘Ҫд»Ө 12npm config set registry http://registry.cnpmjs.org npm info underscore#пјҲеҰӮжһңй…ҚзҪ®жҲҗеҠҹпјҢиҝҷдёӘе‘Ҫд»Өдјҡжңүеӯ—з¬ҰдёІresponseпјү е‘Ҫд»ӨиЎҢжҢҮе®ҡ 1npm --registry http://registry.cnpmjs.org info underscore зј–иҫ‘node_modules/npm/.npmrcеҠ е…ҘдёӢйқўеҶ…е®№ 1registry = http://registry.cnpmjs.org еҰӮжһңдёҠйқўзҡ„npmең°еқҖдёҚиЎҢзҡ„иҜқпјҢеҸҜд»ҘиҜ•иҜ•ж·ҳе®қзҡ„npmhttps://registry.npm.taobao.org node_modules/npm/.npmrcprefix=D:\MyTools
odejs
ode_global пјҲдҝ®ж”№е…ЁеұҖи·Ҝеҫ„пјүcache=D:\MyTools
odejs
ode_global пјҲдҝ®ж”№е…ЁеұҖи·Ҝеҫ„пјү дҝ®ж”№й»ҳи®ӨжЁЎеқ—дёӢиҪҪи·Ҝеҫ„еңЁе®үиЈ…е®ҢnodejsеҗҺпјҢnpm install -g jshintжҳҜиў«е®үиЈ…еңЁй»ҳи®Өи·Ҝеҫ„пјҲC:\Users\з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚ\AppData\Roaming
pmпјүдёӢзҡ„ еҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮдҝ®ж”№nodejsе®үиЈ…и·Ҝеҫ„дёӢзҡ„node_modules/npm/.npmrcж–Үд»¶prefix=D:\MyTools
odejs
ode_global пјҲдҝ®ж”№е…ЁеұҖи·Ҝеҫ„пјүcache=D:\MyTools
odejs
ode_global_cache пјҲдҝ®ж”№е…ЁеұҖи·Ҝеҫ„пјү иҜ·жіЁж„ҸprefixгҖҒcacheдёҚиғҪи®ҫзҪ®жҲҗдёҖж ·зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„пјҢеҗҰеҲҷйҖҡиҝҮnpmе®үиЈ…жЁЎеқ—ж—¶пјҢдјҡжҠҘй”ҷ

posts.excerpt: xamppе®үиЈ…memcacheзӣ‘жҺ§зҺ°еңЁ memadminдёӢиҪҪmemadminпјҢи§ЈеҺӢеҲ°xampp/htdocsдёӢ жҹҘзңӢ php зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ123<?php echo phpinfo();?>

12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970<!-- жү“еҢ… --><build> <finalName>${project.artifactId}</finalName> <resources> <!-- жҢҮе®ҡ src/main/resourcesдёӢжүҖжңүж–Үд»¶еҸҠж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёәиө„жәҗж–Үд»¶ --> <resource> <targetPath>${project.build.directory}/classes</targetPath> <directory>src/main/resources</directory> <filtering>true</filtering> <includes> <include>**/*</include> <!-- <include>**/*.xml</include> <include>**/*.properties</include> --> </includes> </resource> <!-- дҪҝз”Ёcom.alibaba.dubbo.container.MainеҗҜеҠЁеә”з”Ёзҡ„иҜқпјҢиҰҒжҠҠspringй…ҚзҪ®ж”ҫеҲ°/META-INF/springдёӢ --> <resource> <targetPath>${project.build.directory}/classes/META-INF/spring</targetPath> <directory>src/main/resources/spring</directory> <filtering>true</filtering> <includes> <include>spring-context.xml</include> </includes> </resource> </resources> <!-- more --> <plugins> <!-- жү“еҢ…jarж–Үд»¶ж—¶пјҢй…ҚзҪ®manifestж–Үд»¶пјҢеҠ е…ҘlibеҢ…зҡ„jarдҫқиө– --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <classesDirectory>target/classes/</classesDirectory> <archive> <manifest> <mainClass>com.alibaba.dubbo.container.Main</mainClass> <!-- жү“еҢ…ж—¶ MANIFEST.MFж–Үд»¶дёҚи®°еҪ•зҡ„ж—¶й—ҙжҲізүҲжң¬ --> <useUniqueVersions>false</useUniqueVersions> <addClasspath>true</addClasspath> <classpathPrefix>lib/</classpathPrefix> </manifest> <manifestEntries> <Class-Path>.</Class-Path> </manifestEntries> </archive> </configuration> </plugin> <!-- жү“еҢ…jarж—¶пјҢжҠҠдҫқиө–зҡ„з¬¬дёүж–№jarеҢ…пјҢж”ҫеҲ°lib/ж–Үд»¶дёӢ --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-dependency-plugin</artifactId> <executions> <execution> <id>copy-dependencies</id> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>copy-dependencies</goal> </goals> <configuration> <type>jar</type> <includeTypes>jar</includeTypes> <useUniqueVersions>false</useUniqueVersions> <outputDirectory> ${project.build.directory}/lib </outputDirectory> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins></build> й…ҚзҪ®йҳҝйҮҢдә‘з§Ғжңүеә“123456789101112<mirror> <id>aliyun-nexus</id> <mirrorOf>central</mirrorOf> <username>weixin</username> <password>weixin</password></server><server> <id>maven2-weixin-release</id> <username>weixin</username> <password>weixin</password></server><server> жіЁж„ҸпјҢpom.xmlдёӯзҡ„idиҰҒе’Ңsetting.xmlдёӯй…ҚзҪ®зҡ„дёҖиҮҙ еҗҢж—¶еҸ‘еёғжәҗз Ғ 12345678910111213<plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId> <version>2.4</version> <executions> <execution> <id>attach-sources</id> <goals> <goal>jar</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions></plugin> еҰӮжһңдёҚеҸ‘еёғжәҗз ҒпјҢеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁеҰӮдёӢй…ҚзҪ®пјҢеҸӘжү“еҢ…жәҗз ҒпјҢдёҚеҸ‘еёғеҲ°з§Ғжңүд»“еә“ 123456789101112131415<plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <goals> <goal>jar</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions></plugin> жү§иЎҢ deploy еҸ‘еёғ jar еҲ°з§Ғжңүд»“еә“ 1mvn clean deploy -Dmaven.test.skip=true жіЁж„Ҹпјҡrelease зүҲжң¬еҸӘиғҪдёҠдј дёҖж¬ЎпјҢSNAPSHOT зүҲжң¬еҸҜд»Ҙж— йҷҗж¬ЎдёҠдј  дҪҝз”Ёз§Ғжңүд»“еә“дёӢиҪҪ jar еңЁ setting.xml й…ҚзҪ® mirror 12345<mirror> <id>maven2-weixin-public</id> <mirrorOf>maven2-weixin-public</mirrorOf> <url>http://maven.ctim:8081/repository/maven2-weixin-public/</url></mirror> еңЁ setting.xml й…ҚзҪ® profile е№¶жҝҖжҙ» 1234567891011121314151617<profile> posts.title: IntelliJ IDEA жҸ’д»¶
posts.excerpt: IntelliJжҸ’д»¶зҜҮMaven Helper жҲ‘дёҖиҲ¬з”Ёиҝҷж¬ҫжҸ’д»¶жқҘжҹҘзңӢmavenзҡ„дҫқиө–ж ‘гҖӮеңЁдёҚдҪҝз”ЁжӯӨжҸ’д»¶зҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢиҰҒжғіжҹҘзңӢmavenзҡ„дҫқиө–ж ‘е°ұиҰҒдҪҝз”ЁMavenе‘Ҫд»Өmaven dependency:treeжқҘжҹҘзңӢдҫқиө–гҖӮжғіиҰҒжҹҘзңӢжҳҜеҗҰжңүдҫқиө–еҶІзӘҒд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ёmvn dependency:tree -Dverbose -Dincludes=:еҸӘжҹҘзңӢе…іеҝғзҡ„jarеҢ…пјҢдҪҶжҳҜиҝҷж ·иҝҳжҳҜйңҖиҰҒжҲ‘жү§иЎҢе‘Ҫд»ӨпјҢе№¶дё”еҪ“йЎ№зӣ®жҜ”иҫғеӨҚжқӮзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢиҝҷдёӘиҝҮзЁӢжҳҜжҜ”иҫғжј«й•ҝзҡ„гҖӮmaven helperе°ұиғҪеҫҲеҘҪзҡ„и§ЈеҶіиҝҷдёӘй—®йўҳгҖӮ GsonFormat еҝ«жҚ·й”®Alt+SжҲ–иҖ…йј ж ҮеҸій”®йҖүжӢ©Generate>GsonFormat
posts.text: IntelliJжҸ’д»¶зҜҮMaven Helper жҲ‘дёҖиҲ¬з”Ёиҝҷж¬ҫжҸ’д»¶жқҘжҹҘзңӢmavenзҡ„дҫқиө–ж ‘гҖӮеңЁдёҚдҪҝз”ЁжӯӨжҸ’д»¶зҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢиҰҒжғіжҹҘзңӢmavenзҡ„дҫқиө–ж ‘е°ұиҰҒдҪҝз”ЁMavenе‘Ҫд»Өmaven dependency:treeжқҘжҹҘзңӢдҫқиө–гҖӮжғіиҰҒжҹҘзңӢжҳҜеҗҰжңүдҫқиө–еҶІзӘҒд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ёmvn dependency:tree -Dverbose -Dincludes=:еҸӘжҹҘзңӢе…іеҝғзҡ„jarеҢ…пјҢдҪҶжҳҜиҝҷж ·иҝҳжҳҜйңҖиҰҒжҲ‘жү§иЎҢе‘Ҫд»ӨпјҢе№¶дё”еҪ“йЎ№зӣ®жҜ”иҫғеӨҚжқӮзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷпјҢиҝҷдёӘиҝҮзЁӢжҳҜжҜ”иҫғжј«й•ҝзҡ„гҖӮmaven helperе°ұиғҪеҫҲеҘҪзҡ„и§ЈеҶіиҝҷдёӘй—®йўҳгҖӮ GsonFormat еҝ«жҚ·й”®Alt+SжҲ–иҖ…йј ж ҮеҸій”®йҖүжӢ©Generate>GsonFormat InnerBuilder еҝ«жҚ·й”®Alt+InsertгҖҒShift+Alt+BжҲ–иҖ…йј ж ҮеҸій”®йҖүжӢ©Generate->BuilderпјҢдёҖиҲ¬з»ҷе®һдҪ“зұ»е»әз«Ӣgetж–№жі•пјҢе®һдҪ“зұ»зҡ„еұһжҖ§дҪҝз”Ёfinalж Үи®°пјҢеҜ№дәҺдёҚиғҪз©әзҡ„еҖјпјҢеҒҡдёәBuilderжһ„йҖ ж–№жі•зҡ„еҸӮж•°дј е…ҘпјҢжңҖеҘҪжңүдёҖдёӘе®һдҪ“зұ»еҒҡдёәеҸӮж•°зҡ„Builderзҡ„жһ„йҖ ж–№жі• IntelliJ Settingй…ҚзҪ®зҜҮspelling еҺ»жҺүжӢјеҶҷжЈҖжөӢSetting->inspections->spellingпјҢеҺ»жҺүеӢҫ propertiesзј–з Ғй…ҚзҪ® Setting->Editor->File EncodingsпјҢDefault encoding for properties filesйҖүжӢ©UTF-8пјҢе№¶еӢҫдёҠTransparent native-to-ascii conversion дҝ®ж”№жіЁйҮҠжЁЎзүҲ Setting->Editor->File And Code TemplatesпјҢйҖүжӢ©иҰҒдҝ®ж”№зҡ„ж–Үд»¶зұ»еһӢпјҢз„¶еҗҺеңЁIncludesзҡ„File Headerдёӯдҝ®ж”№ д»Јз Ғеҝ«жҚ·з”ҹжҲҗпјҲLive Templatesпјү еҸҜд»Ҙж №жҚ®иҮӘе·ұйңҖжұӮи°ғж•ҙеҝ«жҚ·жЁЎзүҲпјҢжҜ”еҰӮsoutгҖҒsoutvгҖҒsoutmгҖҒpsvmзӯү еҝ«жҚ·жҸҗзӨәпјҲCode Completionпјү Case sensitive completionеҸҜйҖүFirst letterпјҲйҰ–еӯ—жҜҚеҢ№й…ҚпјүгҖҒAllпјҲе…ЁйғЁеҢ№й…ҚпјүгҖҒNoneпјҲдёҚйңҖиҰҒеҢ№й…ҚпјҢе°ұжҳҜеҝҪз•ҘеӨ§е°ҸеҶҷпјү иҪҜжҚўиЎҢ Settings-Editor-GeneralпјҢеӢҫдёҠuse soft wraps in editorSettings->Code Style->General->Right margin(columns)Settings->Code Style->Java->Wrapping and Braces->Ensure rigth margin is not exceeded иҷҡжӢҹз©әж јпјҲе…үж ҮеңЁзј–иҫ‘еҷЁзҡ„д»»ж„ҸдҪҚзҪ®йғҪеҸҜд»ҘзӮ№пјү Settings-Editor-GeneralпјҢеҺ»жҺүAllow placement of caret at end of lineеүҚйқўзҡ„еӢҫ жҠҳеҸ д»Јз Ғ й»ҳи®ӨеҚ•иЎҢж–№жі•жҳҜжҠҳеҸ зҡ„пјҢеңЁsettings-Editor-General-Code FoldingпјҢеҸ–ж¶ҲOne-line methodsе°ұдёҚдјҡжҠҳеҸ дәҶ иҮӘеҠЁдҝқеӯҳж–Үд»¶ Settings-Appearance & Behivior-System SettingsпјҢеҸ–ж¶ҲвҖңSynchronize file on frame activationвҖқ е’ҢвҖңSave files on framedeactivationвҖқзҡ„йҖүжӢ©гҖӮеҗҢж—¶жҲ‘д»¬йҖүжӢ©вҖқSave files automaticallyвҖқ, е№¶е°Ҷе…¶и®ҫзҪ®дёә30з§’пјҢиҝҷж ·IDEAдҫқз„¶еҸҜд»ҘиҮӘеҠЁдҝқжҢҒж–Үд»¶,жүҖд»ҘеңЁжҜҸж¬ЎеҲҮжҚўж—¶пјҢдҪ йңҖиҰҒжҢүдёӢCtrl+Sдҝқеӯҳж–Үд»¶ дҝ®ж”№иҝҮжңӘдҝқеӯҳзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјҢдҪҝз”Ё*еҸ·ж ҮиҜҶеҮәжқҘSettings-Editor-General-Editor Tabs-Mark modified tabs width asterisk еҝ«жҚ·й”®зҜҮ Ctrl + EпјҡжңҖиҝ‘жү“ејҖзҡ„ж–Үд»¶ Ctrl + Shift + EпјҡжңҖиҝ‘зј–иҫ‘зҡ„ж–Үд»¶ Double Shiftпјҡи·іеҲ°зү№е®ҡж–Үд»¶еӨ№ Ctrl + Shift + Enterпјҡеҝ«йҖҹиЎҘе…ЁиЎҢжң«еҲҶеҸ· Ctrl + Shift + AпјҡRest Client Ctrl + Shift + VпјҡзІҳиҙҙзүҲеҺҶеҸІ Alt + EnterпјҡLanguage InjectionеҠҹиғҪпјҢе°ҶдёҖдёӘеӯ—з¬ҰдёІж Үи®°дёә JSONпјҢе°ұеҸҜд»Ҙйқһеёёж–№дҫҝең°зј–еҶҷ JSON дәҶпјҢеҶҚд№ҹдёҚз”ЁжӢ…еҝғиҪ¬д№үзҡ„й—®йўҳдәҶпјӣеҗҢж—¶д№ҹеҸҜд»Ҙж”ҜжҢҒз®ҖеҚ•жӯЈеҲҷжөӢиҜ•иғҪеҠӣ Shift + F7пјҡDebugж—¶еҸҜд»ҘйҖүжӢ©иҝӣе…Ҙе“ӘдёӘж–№жі•и°ғиҜ• Ctrl + Alt + Lпјҡж јејҸеҢ–д»Јз Ғ ##з¬¬дёүж–№jarеҢ…зҜҮ fastjson FastJSONеәҸеҲ—еҢ–зү№ж®Ҡеӯ—з¬ҰBUGй—®йўҳйҮҚзҺ°пјҡJSON.toJSONString(вҖң\u0001\u0080\u0002вҖқ);еңЁ1.1.41+зҡ„зүҲжң¬е·Із»Ҹдҝ®жӯЈжӯӨй—®йўҳпјҢhttps://github.com/alibaba/fastjson/commit/cdf7cb253e961666e2b3c2bdd423abe73ba4324a#diff-0 е…¶д»–idea mavenд№ұз Ғй…ҚзҪ®Maven -> Runner -> VM Options-Dfile.encoding=gbk

posts.title: PagingеҲҶйЎөеҷЁе®һдҫӢ
posts.excerpt: Javaдёӯе®һзҺ°дёҖдёӘеҲҶйЎөеҷЁ
posts.text: Javaдёӯе®һзҺ°дёҖдёӘеҲҶйЎөеҷЁ  java.io.Serializable;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.List;/** * еҲҶйЎөеҷЁ * * @author Create by YL on 2017/05/29. */public class Paging<E> implements Serializable { private static final long serialVersionUID = -2429864663690465105L; private long page = 1; // еҪ“еүҚйЎө private long size = 10; // жҜҸйЎөжҳҫзӨәи®°еҪ•ж•° private long total; // жҖ»и®°еҪ•ж•° private long pages; // жҖ»йЎөж•° private long start = 1; // жҜҸйЎөиө·е§Ӣж•°пјҲд»Һ1ејҖе§Ӣпјү private long end; // жҜҸйЎөз»“жқҹж•° private long prev = 1; // дёҠдёҖйЎөпјҲд»Һ1ејҖе§Ӣпјү private long next; // дёӢдёҖйЎө private boolean hasPrev; // еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰжңүдёҠдёҖйЎө private boolean hasNext; // еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰжңүдёӢдёҖйЎө private List<E> items = new ArrayList<E>(); // жҹҘиҜўз»“жһңйӣҶ public Paging() { } public Paging(long page, long size) { this.page = page; this.size = size; } public long getSize() { return size; } public void setSize(long size) { this.size = size; } public long getPage() { if (page > this.getPages()) page = this.getPages(); if (page <= 0) page = 1; return page; } public void setPage(long page) { this.page = page; } public long getTotal() { return total; } public void setTotal(long total) { this.total = total; } public long getPages() { long total = this.getTotal(); long size = this.getSize(); if ((total % size) == 0) { pages = total / size; } else { pages = total / size + 1; } return pages == 0 ? 1 : pages; } public void setPages(long pages) { this.pages = pages; } /** * ејҖе§ӢиЎҢпјҢеҸҜз”ЁдәҺOracleгҖҒMySQLзӯүеҲҶйЎө * <pre> * Oracle: rownum <= endRow and rownum > startRow * MySQL: limit startRow, pageSize * </pre> */ public long getStart() { start = this.getPage() > 0 ? (this.getPage() - 1) * this.getSize() : 0; return start; } public void setStart(long start) { this.start = start; } /** * з»“жқҹиЎҢпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙз”ЁдәҺoracleеҲҶйЎөдҪҝз”Ё * Oracle: rownum <= endRow */ public long getEnd() { end = this.getStart() + this.getSize(); return end; } public void setEnd(long end) { this.end = end; } public long getPrev() { if (isHasPrev()) { return getPage() - 1; } else { return getPage(); } } public void setPrev(long prev) { this.prev = prev; } public long getNext() { if (isHasNext()) { return getPage() + 1; } else { return getPage(); } } public void setNext(long next) { this.next = next; } public boolean isHasPrev() { return this.getPage() - 1 >= 1; } public void setHasPrev(boolean hasPrev) { this.hasPrev = hasPrev; } public boolean isHasNext() { return getPage() + 1 <= getPages(); } public void setHasNext(boolean hasNext) { this.hasNext = hasNext; } public List<E> getItems() { return items; } public void setItems(List<E> items) { this.items = items; } @Override public String toString() { StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(100); sb.append(this.getClass().getSimpleName()); sb.append(" ["); sb.append("page=").append(this.getPage()); sb.append(", size=").append(this.getSize()); sb.append(", total=").append(this.getTotal()); sb.append(", pages=").append(this.getPages()); sb.append(", start=").append(this.getStart()); sb.append(", end=").append(this.getEnd()); sb.append(", prev=").append(this.getPrev()); sb.append(", next=").append(this.getNext()); sb.append(", hasPrev=").append(this.isHasPrev()); sb.append(", hasNext=").append(this.isHasNext()); sb.append(", items=").append(items); sb.append("]"); return sb.toString(); }}

posts.title: йҳҝйҮҢе·ҙе·ҙdruidиҝһжҺҘжұ й…ҚзҪ®д»Ӣз»Қ
posts.excerpt: druidиҝһжҺҘжұ й…ҚзҪ® filters=statеұһжҖ§зұ»еһӢжҳҜеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢйҖҡиҝҮеҲ«еҗҚзҡ„ж–№ејҸй…ҚзҪ®жү©еұ•жҸ’д»¶пјҢеёёз”Ёзҡ„жҸ’д»¶жңүпјҡзӣ‘жҺ§з»ҹи®Ўз”Ёзҡ„ filter:statж—Ҙеҝ—з”Ёзҡ„ filter:log4jйҳІеҫЎsqlжіЁе…Ҙзҡ„ filter:wall initialSize=5еҲқе§ӢеҢ–ж—¶е»әз«Ӣзү©зҗҶиҝһжҺҘзҡ„дёӘж•°гҖӮеҲқе§ӢеҢ–еҸ‘з”ҹеңЁжҳҫзӨәи°ғз”Ёinitж–№жі•пјҢжҲ–иҖ…з¬¬дёҖж¬ЎgetConnectionж—¶пјҢй»ҳи®Өпјҡ0 minIdle=5жңҖе°ҸиҝһжҺҘжұ ж•°йҮҸ maxActive=30жңҖеӨ§иҝһжҺҘжұ ж•°йҮҸпјҢй»ҳи®Өпјҡ8 maxWait=60000иҺ·еҸ–иҝһжҺҘж—¶жңҖеӨ§зӯүеҫ…ж—¶й—ҙпјҢеҚ•дҪҚжҜ«з§’гҖӮй…ҚзҪ®дәҶmaxWaitд№ӢеҗҺпјҢзјәзңҒеҗҜз”Ёе…¬е№ій”ҒпјҢе№¶еҸ‘ж•ҲзҺҮдјҡжңүжүҖдёӢйҷҚпјҢеҰӮжһңйңҖиҰҒеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮй…ҚзҪ®useUnfairLockеұһжҖ§дёәtrueдҪҝз”Ёйқһе…¬е№ій”ҒгҖӮ
posts.text: druidиҝһжҺҘжұ й…ҚзҪ® filters=statеұһжҖ§зұ»еһӢжҳҜеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢйҖҡиҝҮеҲ«еҗҚзҡ„ж–№ејҸй…ҚзҪ®жү©еұ•жҸ’д»¶пјҢеёёз”Ёзҡ„жҸ’д»¶жңүпјҡзӣ‘жҺ§з»ҹи®Ўз”Ёзҡ„ filter:statж—Ҙеҝ—з”Ёзҡ„ filter:log4jйҳІеҫЎsqlжіЁе…Ҙзҡ„ filter:wall initialSize=5еҲқе§ӢеҢ–ж—¶е»әз«Ӣзү©зҗҶиҝһжҺҘзҡ„дёӘж•°гҖӮеҲқе§ӢеҢ–еҸ‘з”ҹеңЁжҳҫзӨәи°ғз”Ёinitж–№жі•пјҢжҲ–иҖ…з¬¬дёҖж¬ЎgetConnectionж—¶пјҢй»ҳи®Өпјҡ0 minIdle=5жңҖе°ҸиҝһжҺҘжұ ж•°йҮҸ maxActive=30жңҖеӨ§иҝһжҺҘжұ ж•°йҮҸпјҢй»ҳи®Өпјҡ8 maxWait=60000иҺ·еҸ–иҝһжҺҘж—¶жңҖеӨ§зӯүеҫ…ж—¶й—ҙпјҢеҚ•дҪҚжҜ«з§’гҖӮй…ҚзҪ®дәҶmaxWaitд№ӢеҗҺпјҢзјәзңҒеҗҜз”Ёе…¬е№ій”ҒпјҢе№¶еҸ‘ж•ҲзҺҮдјҡжңүжүҖдёӢйҷҚпјҢеҰӮжһңйңҖиҰҒеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮй…ҚзҪ®useUnfairLockеұһжҖ§дёәtrueдҪҝз”Ёйқһе…¬е№ій”ҒгҖӮ poolPreparedStatements=trueжҳҜеҗҰзј“еӯҳpreparedStatementпјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜPSCacheгҖӮPSCacheеҜ№ж”ҜжҢҒжёёж Үзҡ„ж•°жҚ®еә“жҖ§иғҪжҸҗеҚҮе·ЁеӨ§пјҢжҜ”еҰӮиҜҙoracleгҖӮеңЁmysqlдёӢе»әи®®е…ій—ӯгҖӮй»ҳи®Өпјҡfalse maxOpenPreparedStatements=20иҰҒеҗҜз”ЁPSCacheпјҢеҝ…йЎ»й…ҚзҪ®еӨ§дәҺ0пјҢеҪ“еӨ§дәҺ0ж—¶пјҢpoolPreparedStatementsиҮӘеҠЁи§ҰеҸ‘дҝ®ж”№дёәtrueгҖӮеңЁDruidдёӯпјҢдёҚдјҡеӯҳеңЁOracleдёӢPSCacheеҚ з”ЁеҶ…еӯҳиҝҮеӨҡзҡ„й—®йўҳпјҢеҸҜд»ҘжҠҠиҝҷдёӘж•°еҖјй…ҚзҪ®еӨ§дёҖдәӣпјҢжҜ”еҰӮиҜҙ100гҖӮй»ҳи®Өпјҡ-1 timeBetweenEvictionRunsMillis=90000жңүдёӨдёӘеҗ«д№үпјҡ1) DestroyзәҝзЁӢдјҡжЈҖжөӢиҝһжҺҘзҡ„й—ҙйҡ”ж—¶й—ҙпјҢеҰӮжһңиҝһжҺҘз©әй—Іж—¶й—ҙеӨ§дәҺзӯүдәҺminEvictableIdleTimeMillisеҲҷе…ій—ӯзү©зҗҶиҝһжҺҘ 2) testWhileIdleзҡ„еҲӨж–ӯдҫқжҚ®пјҢиҜҰз»ҶзңӢtestWhileIdleеұһжҖ§зҡ„иҜҙжҳҺ minEvictableIdleTimeMillis=1800000иҝһжҺҘдҝқжҢҒз©әй—ІиҖҢдёҚиў«й©ұйҖҗзҡ„жңҖй•ҝж—¶й—ҙпјҲеҚ•дҪҚпјҡmsпјү validationQuery=SELECT 1 FROM DUAL testWhileIdle=trueе»әи®®й…ҚзҪ®дёәtrueпјҢдёҚеҪұе“ҚжҖ§иғҪпјҢе№¶дё”дҝқиҜҒе®үе…ЁжҖ§гҖӮз”іиҜ·иҝһжҺҘзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷжЈҖжөӢпјҢеҰӮжһңз©әй—Іж—¶й—ҙеӨ§дәҺtimeBetweenEvictionRunsMillisпјҢжү§иЎҢvalidationQueryжЈҖжөӢиҝһжҺҘжҳҜеҗҰжңүж•ҲгҖӮй»ҳи®Өпјҡfalse testOnBorrow=falseз”іиҜ·иҝһжҺҘж—¶жү§иЎҢvalidationQueryжЈҖжөӢиҝһжҺҘжҳҜеҗҰжңүж•ҲпјҢеҒҡдәҶиҝҷдёӘй…ҚзҪ®дјҡйҷҚдҪҺжҖ§иғҪгҖӮй»ҳи®Өпјҡtrue е№¶еҸ‘ж Үи®°жё…йҷӨпјҲCMSпјүж”¶йӣҶеҷЁ-XX:+CMSParallelRemarkEnabled # йҷҚдҪҺж Үи®°еҒңйЎҝ-XX:+UseCMSCompactAtFullCollection # еңЁFULLGCзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷеҜ№е№ҙиҖҒд»Јзҡ„еҺӢзј©пјҲCMSжҳҜдёҚдјҡз§»еҠЁеҶ…еӯҳзҡ„пјҢеӣ жӯӨпјҢиҝҷдёӘйқһеёёе®№жҳ“дә§з”ҹзўҺзүҮпјҢеҜјиҮҙеҶ…еӯҳдёҚеӨҹз”ЁпјҢеӣ жӯӨпјҢеҶ…еӯҳзҡ„еҺӢзј©иҝҷдёӘж—¶еҖҷе°ұдјҡиў«еҗҜз”ЁгҖӮеўһеҠ иҝҷдёӘеҸӮж•°жҳҜдёӘеҘҪд№ жғҜгҖӮеҸҜиғҪдјҡеҪұе“ҚжҖ§иғҪпјҢдҪҶжҳҜеҸҜд»Ҙж¶ҲйҷӨзўҺзүҮпјү-XX:LargePageSizeInBytes=128m # еҶ…еӯҳйЎөзҡ„еӨ§е°ҸпјҲеҶ…еӯҳйЎөзҡ„еӨ§е°ҸдёҚеҸҜи®ҫзҪ®иҝҮеӨ§пјҢдјҡеҪұе“ҚPermзҡ„еӨ§е°Ҹпјү-XX:+UseFastAccessorMethods # еҺҹе§Ӣзұ»еһӢзҡ„еҝ«йҖҹдјҳеҢ–-XX:+UseCMSInitiatingOccupancyOnly # дҪҝз”ЁжүӢеҠЁе®ҡд№үеҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҡд№үејҖе§ӢCMSж”¶йӣҶпјҲзҰҒжӯўhostspotиҮӘиЎҢи§ҰеҸ‘CMS GCпјү-XX:CMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction=70 # дҪҝз”ЁCMSдҪңдёәеһғеңҫеӣһж”¶пјҢдҪҝз”Ё70%еҗҺејҖе§ӢCMSж”¶йӣҶпјҲз¬ҰеҗҲе…¬ејҸпјҡCMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction <=((Xmx-Xmn)-(Xmn-Xmn/(SurvivorRatior+2)))/(Xmx-Xmn)*100пјҢеҗҰеҲҷдјҡжҠҘpromontion faildй”ҷиҜҜпјү OmitStackTraceInFastThrowй—®йўҳжҸҸиҝ°пјҡз”ҹдә§зҺҜеўғжҠӣејӮеёё,дҪҶеҚҙжІЎжңүе°Ҷе Ҷж ҲдҝЎжҒҜиҫ“еҮәеҲ°ж—Ҙеҝ—123456-XX:+OmitStackTraceInFastThrow-XX:-OmitStackTraceInFastThrow# -XX:+OmitStackTraceInFastThrowйҖүйЎ№еңЁ-serverжғ…еҶөдёӢй»ҳи®ӨејҖеҗҜгҖӮиҝҷе°ұдёҚйҡҫи§ЈйҮҠдёәдҪ•з»ҸеёёеңЁзі»з»ҹж—Ҙеҝ—дёӯзңӢеҲ°еҫҲеӨҡиЎҢзҡ„java.lang.NullPointerException иӢҰдәҺжүҫдёҚеҲ°stacktraceиҖҢдёҚзҹҘйҒ“й”ҷиҜҜеҮәеңЁдҪ•еӨ„гҖӮ йҒҮеҲ°иҝҷз§Қжғ…еҶөпјҢи§ЈеҶізҡ„ж–№жі•д№ҹеҫҲз®ҖеҚ•пјҡж—ўз„¶еңЁдёҖж®өж—¶й—ҙеҗҺjvmжүҚдјҡиҝӣиЎҢйҮҚж–°зј–иҜ‘дјҳеҢ–пјҢйӮЈд№ҲиҜҘй”ҷиҜҜеңЁеҲҡејҖе§ӢеҮәзҺ°зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷиҝҳжҳҜдјҡжңүstacktraceзҡ„гҖӮжүҖд»Ҙеҗ‘еүҚжҗңзҙўж—Ҙеҝ—пјҢжҲ–иҖ…е°ҶзЁӢеәҸйҮҚеҗҜпјҢи§ӮеҜҹеҲҡйҮҚеҗҜж—¶еҖҷзҡ„logдҫҝеҸҜд»ҘжүҫеҲ°й”ҷиҜҜзҡ„stacktrace PreserveFramePointer12вҖ“XX:+PreserveFramePointer# еҰӮжһңдҪ и§үеҫ—дҪ жңүдёҖеӨ©дјҡдҪҝз”Ё perfj з”» Flame Graph зҡ„иҜқ

posts.text: еҹәдәҺstore.jsе®һзҺ°localStorageзј“еӯҳиҝҮжңҹзӯ–з•Ҙ "use strict";(function(s) { /** * еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰж”ҜжҢҒlocalStorageжң¬ең°еӯҳеӮЁ */ if (!s.enabled) { console.error('localStorage is not supported by your browser.') return; } /** * и§„е®ҡж—Ҙжңҹж јејҸ * жҜ”еҰӮпјҡyyyyе№ҙMMжңҲddж—Ҙ HH:mm:ss SгҖҒyyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss S...... */ function _checkFormat(fmt) { if (!/^y+[\u5e74-]?M+[\u6708-]?(d+)[\u65e5]? H+[\u65f6:]?m+[\u5206:]?s+[\u79d2]?(( S)?)$/.test(fmt)) { throw new Error('"' + fmt + '" is not supported by the format.'); return false; } return true; } /** * ж—¶й—ҙж јејҸеҢ–пјҡж—¶й—ҙжҜ«з§’ж•°гҖҒDateеҜ№иұЎ ---> ж—¶й—ҙеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ й»ҳи®Өж јејҸеҢ–ж јејҸпјҡyyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss */ function _date2str(str, fmt) { if (fmt === undefined) { fmt = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; } _checkFormat(fmt); var date; if (typeof str === 'number') { date = new Date(str); } else if (_isValidDate(str)) { date = str; } var o = { 'M+' : date.getMonth() + 1, // жңҲ 'd+' : date.getDate(), // ж—Ҙ 'H+' : date.getHours(), // е°Ҹж—¶пјҲ24е°Ҹж—¶еҲ¶пјү 'm+' : date.getMinutes(), // еҲҶ 's+' : date.getSeconds(), // з§’ 'S' : date.getMilliseconds() // жҜ«з§’ }; if (/(y+)/.test(fmt)) { fmt = fmt.replace(RegExp.$1, (date.getFullYear() + '') .substr(4 - RegExp.$1.length)); } for ( var k in o) { if (new RegExp('(' + k + ')').test(fmt)) { fmt = fmt.replace(RegExp.$1, (RegExp.$1.length == 1) ? (o[k]) : (('00' + o[k]).substr(('' + o[k]).length))); } } return fmt; } /** * ж—¶й—ҙж јејҸеҢ–пјҡе°Ҷж—¶й—ҙеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ ---> DateеҜ№иұЎ й»ҳи®Өж јејҸеҢ–ж јејҸпјҡyyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssпјҢдҪҝз”Ёдёӯж–ҮдёҚиғҪж јејҸеҢ– */ function _str2date(str, fmt) { if (fmt === undefined) { fmt = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; } _checkFormat(fmt); var o = [ 'y+', // е№ҙ 'M+', // жңҲ 'd+', // ж—Ҙ 'H+', // е°Ҹж—¶пјҲ24е°Ҹж—¶еҲ¶пјү 'm+', // еҲҶ 's+', // з§’ 'S' // жҜ«з§’ ]; var date = new Date(); for (var k = 0; k < o.length; k++) { var s = o[k]; if (new RegExp('(' + s + ')').test(fmt)) { var r = RegExp.$1; var rl = RegExp.$1.length; var si = fmt.indexOf(RegExp.$1); var ei = si + rl; var n = 0; if (r.indexOf('S') > -1) { n = parseInt(str.substr(si)); date.setMilliseconds(n); // и®ҫзҪ® Date еҜ№иұЎдёӯзҡ„жҜ«з§’ (0 ~ 999)гҖӮ } else { n = parseInt(str.substring(si, ei)); if (r.indexOf('y') > -1) { date.setFullYear(n); // и®ҫзҪ® Date еҜ№иұЎдёӯзҡ„е№ҙд»ҪпјҲеӣӣдҪҚж•°еӯ—пјүгҖӮ } else if (r.indexOf('M') > -1) { date.setMonth(n - 1); // и®ҫзҪ® Date еҜ№иұЎдёӯжңҲд»Ҫ (0 ~ 11)гҖӮ } else if (r.indexOf('d') > -1) { date.setDate(n); // и®ҫзҪ® Date еҜ№иұЎдёӯжңҲзҡ„жҹҗдёҖеӨ© (1 ~ 31)гҖӮ } else if (r.indexOf('H') > -1) { date.setHours(n); // и®ҫзҪ® Date еҜ№иұЎдёӯзҡ„е°Ҹж—¶ (0 ~ 23)гҖӮ } else if (r.indexOf('m') > -1) { date.setMinutes(n); // и®ҫзҪ® Date еҜ№иұЎдёӯзҡ„еҲҶй’ҹ (0 ~ 59)гҖӮ } else if (r.indexOf('s') > -1) { date.setSeconds(n); // и®ҫзҪ® Date еҜ№иұЎдёӯзҡ„з§’й’ҹ (0 ~ 59)гҖӮ } } } } return date; } /** * иҪ¬жҚўпјҡжҜ«з§’ ---> еӨ©ж—¶еҲҶз§’жҜ«з§’ */ function _ms2s(ms) { var s = parseInt(ms / 1000);// з§’ var m = 0;// еҲҶ var h = 0;// е°Ҹж—¶ var d = 0;// еӨ© if (s >= 60) { m = parseInt(s / 60); s = parseInt(s % 60); if (m >= 60) { h = parseInt(m / 60); m = parseInt(m % 60); if (h >= 24) { d = parseInt(h / 24); h = parseInt(h % 24); } } } var str = ''; if (s > 0) str = '' + parseInt(s) + '\u79d2' + str; if (m > 0) str = '' + parseInt(m) + '\u5206' + str; if (h > 0) str = '' + parseInt(h) + '\u5c0f\u65f6' + str; if (d > 0) str = '' + parseInt(d) + '\u5929' + str; return str; } /** * и®ҫзҪ®жңүж•Ҳж—¶й—ҙпјҢиҝ”еӣһеҜ№иұЎ */ function VConstructor(val, exp) { var item = {}; // еҲӣе»әж—¶й—ҙгҖҒжңүж•Ҳж—¶й—ҙ var createTime = (new Date()).getTime(), effectiveTime; if (typeof exp === 'number') { effectiveTime = new Date(createTime + exp * 60000); } else if (typeof exp === 'string') { effectiveTime = _str2date(exp); } if (effectiveTime && !_isValidDate(effectiveTime)) { throw new Error('effectiveTime cannot be converted to a valid Date instance'); } effectiveTime = effectiveTime.getTime(); item['c'] = _date2str(createTime); item['e'] = _date2str(effectiveTime); item['t'] = _ms2s(effectiveTime - createTime); item['v'] = val; return item; } /** * еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰжҳҜDateеҜ№иұЎ */ function _isValidDate(date) { return Object.prototype.toString.call(date) === '[object Date]' && !isNaN(date.getTime()); } /** * еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰи®ҫзҪ®дәҶжңүж•Ҳж—¶й—ҙ */ function _hasEffective(item) { if (item) { if (typeof item === 'object' && 'c' in item && 'e' in item && 'v' in item) { return true; } } return false; } /** * еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰжҳҜжңүж•Ҳ */ function _isEffective(item) { var ntime = (new Date()).getTime(); return ntime < _str2date(item.e); } /** * еҲӨж–ӯkeyжҳҜеҗҰжҳҜеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢеҰӮжһңдёҚжҳҜпјҢеҲҷиҪ¬жҚўжҲҗеӯ—з¬ҰдёІ */ function _keyAsString(key) { if (typeof key !== 'string') { console.warn(key + ' used as a key, but it is not a string.'); key = String(key); } return key; } /** * exp еӨұж•Ҳж—¶й—ҙпјҡй»ҳи®Өдёә0пјҲеҚ•дҪҚпјҡеҲҶй’ҹпјү */ s.setExp = function(key, val, exp) { key = _keyAsString(key); if (exp === undefined) { exp = 0; } s.set(key, new VConstructor(val, exp)); }; s.getExp = function(key) { key = _keyAsString(key); var item = null; try { item = s.get(key); } catch (e) { return null; } if (_hasEffective(item)) { if (_isEffective(item)) { return item.v; } else { s.remove(key); return null; } } else { return item; } }; s.getAllExp = function() { var ret = {}; s.forEachExp(function(key, val) { ret[key] = val; }) return ret; }; s.forEachExp = function(callback) { var storage = s.getAll(); for ( var key in storage) { callback(key, s.getExp(key)); } };})(store);

builder.build(); /* * Use a custom connection factory to customize the process of * initialization of outgoing HTTP connections. Beside standard * connection configuration parameters HTTP connection factory can * define message parser / writer routines to be employed by individual * connections. */ HttpConnectionFactory<HttpRoute, ManagedHttpClientConnection> cf = new ManagedHttpClientConnectionFactory(); /* * SSL context for secure connections can be created either based on * system or application specific properties. */ SSLContext sslc = SSLContexts.createSystemDefault(); /* * Create a registry of custom connection socket factories for supported * protocol schemes. */ Registry<ConnectionSocketFactory> sfr = RegistryBuilder.<ConnectionSocketFactory>create().register("http", PlainConnectionSocketFactory.INSTANCE).register("https", new SSLConnectionSocketFactory(sslc)).build(); /* * Create socket configuration */ SocketConfig sc = SocketConfig.custom().setTcpNoDelay(this.isTcpNoDelay()).build(); /* * Create a connection manager with custom configuration. */ PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager manager = new PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager(sfr, cf); // е°ҶиҝһжҺҘз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁй…ҚзҪ®дёәдҪҝз”ЁеҘ—жҺҘеӯ—й…ҚзҪ®пјҲй»ҳи®Өжғ…еҶөдёӢжҲ–зү№е®ҡдё»жңәпјүгҖӮ manager.setDefaultSocketConfig(sc); // manager.setSocketConfig(new HttpHost("somehost", 80), // socketConfig); // еңЁдёҚжҙ»еҠЁ30з§’еҗҺйӘҢиҜҒиҝһжҺҘ manager.setValidateAfterInactivity(this.getValidateAfterInactivity()); /* * Create message constraints */ MessageConstraints mc = MessageConstraints.custom().setMaxHeaderCount(this.getMaxHeaderCount()) .setMaxLineLength(this.getSetMaxLineLength()).build(); /* * Create connection configuration */ ConnectionConfig cc = ConnectionConfig.custom().setMalformedInputAction(CodingErrorAction.IGNORE) .setUnmappableInputAction(CodingErrorAction.IGNORE).setCharset(Charset.forName(this.getCharset())) .setMessageConstraints(mc).build(); // е°ҶиҝһжҺҘз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁй…ҚзҪ®дёәдҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®Өжғ…еҶөдёӢжҲ–зү№е®ҡдё»жңәзҡ„иҝһжҺҘй…ҚзҪ®гҖӮ manager.setDefaultConnectionConfig(cc); // manager.setConnectionConfig(new HttpHost("somehost", 80), // ConnectionConfig.DEFAULT); // й…ҚзҪ®иҝһжҺҘжұ жңҖеӨ§иҝһжҺҘж•°пјҢе’ҢжҜҸдёӘи·Ҝз”ұжңҖеӨ§з§ҹз”ЁиҝһжҺҘж•°йҮҸ manager.setMaxTotal(this.getMaxTotal()); manager.setDefaultMaxPerRoute(this.getDefaultMaxPerRoute()); /* * 4.3д»ҘдёҠзүҲжң¬жҺЁиҚҗдҪҝз”ЁHttpClientBuilderжқҘеҲӣе»әclient */ HttpClientBuilder clientBuilder = HttpClients.custom(); clientBuilder.setConnectionManager(manager); // clientBuilder.setDefaultCookieStore(cookieStore); // clientBuilder.setDefaultCredentialsProvider(credentialsProvider); // clientBuilder.setProxy(new HttpHost("myproxy", 8080)); clientBuilder.setDefaultRequestConfig(rc); client = clientBuilder.build(); } public static Builder custom() { return new Builder(); } public static Builder copy(final Client copy) { return new Builder().socketTimeout(copy.socketTimeout).connectTimeout(copy.connectTimeout) .connectionRequestTimeout(copy.connectionRequestTimeout).ignoreCookies(copy.ignoreCookies).tcpNoDelay (copy.tcpNoDelay).validateAfterInactivity(copy.validateAfterInactivity).maxHeaderCount(copy .maxHeaderCount).setMaxLineLength(copy.setMaxLineLength).maxTotal(copy.maxTotal) .defaultMaxPerRoute(copy.defaultMaxPerRoute).charset(copy.charset); } public int getSocketTimeout() { return socketTimeout; } public int getConnectTimeout() { return connectTimeout; } public int getConnectionRequestTimeout() { return connectionRequestTimeout; } public boolean isIgnoreCookies() { return ignoreCookies; } public boolean isTcpNoDelay() { return tcpNoDelay; } public int getValidateAfterInactivity() { return validateAfterInactivity; } public int getMaxHeaderCount() { return maxHeaderCount; } public int getSetMaxLineLength() { return setMaxLineLength; } public int getMaxTotal() { return maxTotal; } public int getDefaultMaxPerRoute() { return defaultMaxPerRoute; } public String getCharset() { return charset; } @Override public String toString() { StringBuilder builder = new StringBuilder(); builder.append("TSHttpClient [socketTimeout=").append(socketTimeout).append(", connectTimeout=").append (connectTimeout).append(", connectionRequestTimeout=").append(connectionRequestTimeout).append(", " + "ignoreCookies=").append(ignoreCookies).append(", tcpNoDelay=").append(tcpNoDelay).append(", " + "validateAfterInactivity=").append(validateAfterInactivity).append(", maxHeaderCount=").append (maxHeaderCount).append(", setMaxLineLength=").append(setMaxLineLength).append(", maxTotal=").append (maxTotal).append(", defaultMaxPerRoute=").append(defaultMaxPerRoute).append(", charset=").append (charset).append("]"); return builder.toString(); } public static class Builder { private int socketTimeout = 8000; private int connectTimeout = 8000; private int connectionRequestTimeout = 10 * 1000; private boolean ignoreCookies = true; private boolean tcpNoDelay = true; private int validateAfterInactivity = 30 * 1000; private int maxHeaderCount = 200; private int setMaxLineLength = 2000; private int maxTotal = 150; private int defaultMaxPerRoute = 10; private String charset = "UTF-8"; Builder() { } public Builder socketTimeout(int socketTimeout) { this.socketTimeout = socketTimeout; return this; } public Builder connectTimeout(int connectTimeout) { this.connectTimeout = connectTimeout; return this; } public Builder connectionRequestTimeout(int connectionRequestTimeout) { this.connectionRequestTimeout = connectionRequestTimeout; return this; } public Builder ignoreCookies(boolean ignoreCookies) { this.ignoreCookies = ignoreCookies; return this; } public Builder tcpNoDelay(boolean tcpNoDelay) { this.tcpNoDelay = tcpNoDelay; return this; } public Builder validateAfterInactivity(int validateAfterInactivity) { this.validateAfterInactivity = validateAfterInactivity; return this; } public Builder maxHeaderCount(int maxHeaderCount) { this.maxHeaderCount = maxHeaderCount; return this; } public Builder setMaxLineLength(int setMaxLineLength) { this.setMaxLineLength = setMaxLineLength; return this; } public Builder maxTotal(int maxTotal) { this.maxTotal = maxTotal; return this; } public Builder defaultMaxPerRoute(int defaultMaxPerRoute) { this.defaultMaxPerRoute = defaultMaxPerRoute; return this; } public Builder charset(String charset) { this.charset = charset; return this; } public Client build() { return new Client(socketTimeout, connectTimeout, connectionRequestTimeout, ignoreCookies, tcpNoDelay, validateAfterInactivity, maxHeaderCount, setMaxLineLength, maxTotal, defaultMaxPerRoute, charset); } } /** * еҸ‘йҖҒgetиҜ·жұӮ * * @author YangLi : 2015е№ҙ12жңҲ16ж—Ҙ */ public Response get(String url) throws HttpException { HttpGet httpGet = new HttpGet(url); return get(httpGet); } /** * еҸ‘йҖҒgetиҜ·жұӮ * * @author YangLi : 2015е№ҙ12жңҲ16ж—Ҙ */ public Response get(HttpGet httpGet) throws HttpException { return execute(httpGet); } /** * еҸ‘йҖҒpostиҜ·жұӮпјҡдёҚеёҰиҫ“е…Ҙж•°жҚ® * * @param url ең°еқҖ * @throws HttpException * @author YangLi : 2016е№ҙ3жңҲ24ж—Ҙ */ public Response post(String url) throws HttpException { HttpPost httpPost = new HttpPost(url); return post(httpPost); } /** * еҸ‘йҖҒpostиҜ·жұӮпјҡдҪҝз”ЁUrlEncodedFormEntityжЁЎжӢҹиЎЁеҚ•жҸҗдәӨпјҢK-VеҪўејҸеҸӮж•° * * @param url ең°еқҖ * @param nvpList дј еҖјзӨәдҫӢпјҡ<br/> * List&lt;NameValuePair> nvpList = new ArrayList * &lt;NameValuePair>();<br/> * nvpList.add(new BasicNameValuePair(key, value)); * @throws HttpException * @author YangLi : 2016е№ҙ3жңҲ24ж—Ҙ */ public Response post(String url, List<NameValuePair> nvpList) throws HttpException { try { return post(url, new UrlEncodedFormEntity(nvpList, this.getCharset())); } catch (UnsupportedEncodingException e) { throw new HttpException("дёҚж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„зј–з Ғж јејҸпјҡ" + this.getCharset(), e); } } /** * еҸ‘йҖҒpostиҜ·жұӮпјҡдҪҝз”ЁStringEntityжҸҗдәӨapplication/jsonж јејҸпјҢJSONеҪўејҸ * * @author YangLi : 2016е№ҙ2жңҲ24ж—Ҙ */ public Response post(String url, String json) throws HttpException { return post(url, new StringEntity(json, ContentType.APPLICATION_JSON)); } /** * еҸ‘йҖҒpostиҜ·жұӮ * <p> * 1гҖҒеҸ‘йҖҒjsonж јејҸеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҲй»ҳи®ӨUTF-8зј–з Ғпјүпјҡnew StringEntity(text, ContentType.APPLICATION_JSON) * <p> * 2гҖҒpostжҸҗдәӨиЎЁеҚ•пјҡnew UrlEncodedFormEntity(nvpList, this.getCharset()) * <p> * 3гҖҒдёҠдј ж–Үд»¶пјҡ * <pre> * MultipartEntityBuilder meBuilder = MultipartEntityBuilder.create(); * // еёҰе…¶д»–еҸӮж•° * for (NameValuePair nameValuePair : nvpList) { * meBuilder.addPart(nameValuePair.getName(), new StringBody(nameValuePair.getValue(), ContentType.TEXT_PLAIN)); * } * // еӨҡдёӘж–Үд»¶дҪҝз”ЁforеҫӘзҺҜпјҢеҚ•дёӘж–Үд»¶дёҚйңҖиҰҒforеҫӘзҺҜ * for (File file : files) { * FileBody fileBody = new FileBody(file); * meBuilder.addPart("files", fileBody); * } * HttpEntity httpEntity = meBuilder.build(); * </pre> * * @author YangLi : 2016е№ҙ2жңҲ24ж—Ҙ */ public Response post(String url, HttpEntity entity) throws HttpException { HttpPost httpPost = new HttpPost(url); httpPost.setEntity(entity); return post(httpPost); } /** * еҸ‘йҖҒpostиҜ·жұӮ * * @author YangLi : 2015е№ҙ12жңҲ16ж—Ҙ */ private Response post(HttpPost httpPost) throws HttpException { return execute(httpPost); } private Response execute(HttpUriRequest request) throws HttpException { Args.notNull(request, "HTTP request"); logDebug("method: {}, uri: {}", request.getMethod(), request.getURI()); CloseableHttpResponse httpResponse = null; try { // HttpClientContext context = HttpClientContext.create(); // httpResponse = client.execute(request, context); httpResponse = client.execute(request); int statusCode = httpResponse.getStatusLine().getStatusCode(); logDebug("method: {}, uri: {}, statusCode: {}", request.getMethod(), request.getURI(), statusCode); if (statusCode != HttpStatus.SC_OK) { throw new HttpException(getCause(statusCode), statusCode); } HttpEntity entity = httpResponse.getEntity(); String result = EntityUtils.toString(entity, this.getCharset()); logDebug("method: {}, uri: {}, response: {}", request.getMethod(), request.getURI(), result); Response response = new Response(); response.setResponseAsString(result); return response; } catch (ParseException e) { throw new HttpException("и§Јжһҗй”ҷиҜҜ", e); } catch (ClientProtocolException e) { throw new HttpException("HTTPеҚҸи®®й”ҷиҜҜ", e); } catch (IOException e) { throw new HttpException("I/Oж“ҚдҪңејӮеёё", e); } finally { if (httpResponse != null) { try { httpResponse.close(); } catch (IOException e) { e.printStackTrace(); } } } } /** * йҖҡиҝҮstatusCodeиҺ·еҸ–й”ҷиҜҜдҝЎжҒҜ * * @author YangLi : 2015е№ҙ12жңҲ16ж—Ҙ */ private String getCause(int statusCode) { String message = ""; switch (statusCode) { case HttpStatus.SC_NOT_MODIFIED: break; case HttpStatus.SC_BAD_REQUEST: message = "иҜ·жұӮеҮәй”ҷ"; break; case HttpStatus.SC_UNAUTHORIZED: message = "жңӘжҺҲжқғ"; break; case HttpStatus.SC_FORBIDDEN: message = "жӢ’з»қи®ҝй—®"; break; case HttpStatus.SC_NOT_FOUND: message = "иҜ·жұӮзҡ„URIжҳҜж— ж•Ҳзҡ„жҲ–иҖ…жүҖиҜ·жұӮзҡ„иө„жәҗдёҚеӯҳеңЁ"; break; case HttpStatus.SC_NOT_ACCEPTABLE: message = "дёҚжҺҘеҸ—иҜ·жұӮ"; break; case HttpStatus.SC_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: message = "еҶ…йғЁжңҚеҠЎеҷЁй”ҷиҜҜ"; break; case HttpStatus.SC_BAD_GATEWAY: message = "й”ҷиҜҜзҡ„зҪ‘е…і"; break; case HttpStatus.SC_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: message = "жҡӮеҒңжңҚеҠЎ"; break; default: message = "е…¶д»–й”ҷиҜҜ"; } return "[ " + statusCode + " ] " + message; } public void logDebug(String format, Object... arguments) { if (logger.isDebugEnabled()) { logger.debug(format, arguments); } }}

posts.excerpt: й—®йўҳдёҖ max virtual memory areas vm.max_map_count [65530] is too low, increase to at least [262144]й…ҚзҪ® /etc/sysctl.conf12$ vi /etc/sysctl.confvm.max_map_count=262144
posts.text: й—®йўҳдёҖ max virtual memory areas vm.max_map_count [65530] is too low, increase to at least [262144]й…ҚзҪ® /etc/sysctl.conf12$ vi /etc/sysctl.confvm.max_map_count=262144 з”ҹж•Ҳ1$ sysctl -p йӘҢиҜҒ1$ sysctl -a|grep vm.max_map_count й—®йўҳдәҢ max file descriptors [4096] for elasticsearch process is too low, increase to at least [65536]max number of threads [1024] for user [XXX] is too lowпјҢincrease to least [2048]1гҖҒдҝ®ж”№ nofile ж—¶еҖҷпјҢйңҖиҰҒеңЁ /etc/sysctl.conf е’Ң /etc/security/limits.conf й…ҚзҪ®пјҢе…¶дёӯ /etc/sysctl.conf дёӯй…ҚзҪ®зҡ„еҖјйңҖиҰҒжҜ” /etc/security/limits.conf зҡ„еҖјеӨ§й…ҚзҪ® /etc/sysctl.conf12$ vi /etc/sysctl.conf fs.file-max = 512000 з”ҹж•Ҳ1$ sysctl -p й…ҚзҪ® /etc/security/limits.conf12$ vi /etc/security/limits.confelasticsearch - nofile 65536 жҲ–иҖ…1* - nofile 65536 2гҖҒдҝ®ж”№ nofile е’Ң nprocCentOS 7 зҡ„ nproc зҡ„дҝ®ж”№еңЁ /etc/security/limits.d/20-nproc.confпјҢдёәдәҶж–№дҫҝеңЁ /etc/security/limits.conf е’Ң /etc/security/limits.d/20-nproc.conf ж–Үд»¶йҮҢйқўеҗҢж—¶йғҪж·»еҠ дәҶй…ҚзҪ® /etc/security/limits.conf12$ vi /etc/security/limits.conf* - nproc 65536 й…ҚзҪ® /etc/security/limits.d/20-nproc.conf123$ vi /etc/security/limits.d/20-nproc.conf* - nofile 65536* - nproc 65536 йҮҚеҗҜзі»з»ҹпјҢйӘҢиҜҒ1$ ulimit -Hn жҖ»з»“пјҡ1234567891011$ vi /etc/sysctl.confvm.max_map_count=262144fs.file-max=512000$ vi /etc/security/limits.confelasticsearch - nofile 65536* - nproc 65536$ vi /etc/security/limits.d/20-nproc.conf* - nofile 65536* - nproc 65536

elasticsearch-5.0.2.zipcd elasticsearch-5.0.2/ дёӢиҪҪе№¶е®үиЈ… .tar.gz еҢ… 1234wget https://artifacts.elastic.cn/downloads/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-5.0.2.tar.gzsha1sum elasticsearch-5.0.2.tar.gztar -zxvf elasticsearch-5.0.2.tar.gzcd elasticsearch-5.0.2/ дәҢгҖҒиҝҗиЎҢ Elasticsearch1./bin/elasticsearch Window зі»з»ҹд№ҹжҳҜдёҖж ·гҖӮй»ҳи®Өзҡ„пјҢElasticsearch иҝҗиЎҢеңЁеүҚеҸ°пјҢе№¶дё”жү“еҚ°ж—Ҙеҝ—пјҢеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮ ctrl+c жқҘеҒңжӯўе®ғзҡ„иҝҗиЎҢгҖӮWindows зі»з»ҹиҝҳеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮ elasticsearch-service.bat е‘Ҫд»ӨжқҘе°Ҷ Elasticsearch жіЁеҶҢдёәдёҖдёӘжңҚеҠЎгҖӮдҪ еҸҜд»ҘеңЁжөҸи§ҲеҷЁжү“ејҖ localhost:9200пјҢжқҘжҹҘзңӢ Elasticsearch жҳҜеҗҰиҝҗиЎҢгҖӮж—Ҙеҝ—иҫ“еҮәеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮ -q жҲ–иҖ… -quiet йҖүйЎ№жқҘзҰҒжӯўгҖӮе°Ҷ Elasticsearch еҪ“еҒҡе®ҲжҠӨиҝӣзЁӢжқҘиҝҗиЎҢ1./bin/elasticsearch -d -p pid ж—Ҙеҝ—дҝЎжҒҜи®°еҪ•еңЁ $ES_HOME/logs/пјҢproces id дјҡи®°еҪ•еңЁ pid ж–Үд»¶гҖӮеҒңжӯў Elasticsearch дҪҝз”ЁеҰӮдёӢе‘Ҫд»Өпјҡ1kill 'cat pid' дёүгҖҒй…ҚзҪ® ElasticsearchElasticsearch й»ҳи®Өд»Һ $ES_HOME/config/elasticsearch.yml еҠ иҪҪй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶гҖӮй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёӯзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®йғҪеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮе‘Ҫд»ӨжқҘи®ҫе®ҡпјҢдҪҝз”Ё -E иҜӯжі•пјҡ1./bin/elasticsearch -d -Ecluster.name=my_cluster -Enode.name=node_1 еҰӮжһңеҖјдёӯеёҰжңүз©әж јпјҢеңЁеҖјеҝ…йЎ»дҪҝз”ЁвҖқвҖқеҢ…еӣҠиө·жқҘгҖӮдёҖиҲ¬пјҢйӣҶзҫӨеұӮйқўзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®пјҲдҫӢеҰӮпјҡcluster.nameпјүеә”иҜҘж·»еҠ еҲ° elasticsearch.yml ж–Үд»¶пјҢиҝ‘зӮ№еұӮйқўзҡ„и®ҫзҪ®пјҲдҫӢеҰӮпјҡnode.nameпјүеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮе‘Ҫд»ӨжқҘи®ҫзҪ®гҖӮ 3.1 йҮҚиҰҒзҡ„зі»з»ҹй…ҚзҪ®еҗҜеҠЁ elasticsearch ж—¶еҖҷйҒҮеҲ° nofileгҖҒnprocгҖҒjvm зӯүжҠҘй”ҷ 3.2 и®ҫзҪ® JVM еҸӮж•°йҰ–йҖүзҡ„и®ҫзҪ®JVMеҸӮж•°зҡ„ж–№жі•жҳҜйҖҡиҝҮ config/jvm.options й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶пјҲдҪҝз”Ё .zip жҲ–иҖ… .tar.gz е®үиЈ…еҢ…ж—¶пјүпјҢ/etc/elasticsearch/jvm.optionsпјҲеҪ“дҪҝз”Ё Debian жҲ–иҖ… RPM е®үиЈ…еҢ…ж—¶пјүгҖӮJVM еҸӮж•°еҝ…йЎ»д»Ҙ - ејҖе§ӢпјҢдҪ еҸҜд»Ҙж·»еҠ иҮӘе®ҡд№үJVMж ҮиҜҶе№¶дё”жҠҠиҝҷдёӘй…ҚзҪ®дёҠдј еҲ°дҪ зҡ„зүҲжң¬жҺ§еҲ¶зі»з»ҹгҖӮ й»ҳи®Өзҡ„ Elasticsearch и®ҫзҪ®зҡ„ JVM еҶ…еӯҳеӨ§е°Ҹдёә2GBпјҢеҪ“еҗ‘з”ҹдә§зҺҜеўғйғЁзҪІж—¶иҰҒзЎ®е®ҡ Elasticsearch жңүи¶іеӨҹзҡ„еҶ…еӯҳеҸҜз”ЁгҖӮеҘҪзҡ„и§„еҲҷжҳҜпјҡ и®ҫзҪ®-XmsдёҺ-Xmxзӣёзӯү жіЁж„ҸеӨӘеӨ§зҡ„еҶ…еӯҳе®№жҳ“дә§з”ҹй•ҝзҡ„еһғеңҫеӣһж”¶еҒңйЎҝ -XmxдёҚиҰҒи¶…иҝҮдҪ зү©зҗҶеҶ…еӯҳзҡ„50% дёҚиҰҒи®ҫзҪ®-Xmxи¶…иҝҮJVMз”ЁжқҘеҺӢзј©еҜ№иұЎжҢҮй’Ҳзҡ„еӨ§е°ҸпјҢзІҫзЎ®зҡ„дёҙз•ҢеҖјдёҚжҳҜеӣәе®ҡзҡ„пјҢдҪҶжҳҜжҺҘиҝ‘дәҺ32GBгҖӮ дёӢйқўжҳҜи®ҫзҪ®JVMеҶ…еӯҳеӨ§е°Ҹзҡ„дҫӢеӯҗпјҡ12-Xms2g -Xmx2g 3.3 зҰҒжӯўеҶ…еӯҳдәӨжҚўеӨ§еӨҡж•°ж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹдјҡз”Ёе°ҪеҸҜиғҪеӨҡзҡ„еҶ…еӯҳз”ЁдәҺж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹзј“еӯҳе’ҢеҸҠж—©жҚўеҮәж— з”Ёзҡ„еә”з”ЁеҶ…еӯҳгҖӮиҝҷеҸҜиғҪеҜјиҮҙдёҖйғЁеҲҶJVMеҶ…еӯҳиў«дәӨжҚўеҲ°зЎ¬зӣҳдёҠгҖӮ иҝҷз§ҚеҶ…еӯҳдәӨжҚўйқһеёёдёҚеҲ©дәҺжҖ§иғҪе’ҢиҠӮзӮ№зҡ„зЁіе®ҡжҖ§гҖӮеә”иҜҘз«ӯе°ҪжүҖиғҪжқҘйҒҝе…Қиҝҷз§Қжғ…еҶөгҖӮе®ғиғҪеј•иө·еһғеңҫеӣһж”¶жҢҒз»ӯй•ҝиҫҫж•°еҲҶй’ҹиҖҢдёҚжҳҜеҮ жҜ«з§’е№¶дё”иғҪеҜјиҮҙиҠӮзӮ№е“Қеә”зј“ж…ўз”ҡиҮідёҺйӣҶзҫӨеӨұеҺ»иҒ”зі»гҖӮ иҝҷйҮҢжңүдёүз§Қж–№жі•жқҘзҰҒжӯўеҶ…еӯҳдәӨжҚўпјҡ еҗҜз”Ё bootstrap.memory_lockйҖҡиҝҮдҪҝз”Ё Linux/Unix зі»з»ҹзҡ„ mlockall жҲ–иҖ… Windows зі»з»ҹзҡ„ VirtualLock е°қиҜ•й”Ғе®ҡ RAM дёӯзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢең°еқҖз©әй—ҙпјҢйҳІжӯўд»»дҪ• Elasticsearch еҶ…еӯҳиў«дәӨжҚўгҖӮеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮеҗ‘ config/elasticsearch.yml ж–Үд»¶дёӯж·»еҠ д»ҘдёӢиҜӯеҸҘжқҘе®һзҺ°пјҡ1bootstrap.memory_lock: true иӯҰе‘Ҡпјҡmlockall еҰӮжһңе°қиҜ•еҲҶй…Қи¶…иҝҮдәҶеҸҜз”Ёзҡ„еҶ…еӯҳпјҢеҸҜиғҪдјҡеј•иө· JVM жҲ–иҖ… shell session йҖҖеҮәгҖӮеңЁеҗҜеҠЁE lasticsearch еҗҺпјҢдҪ еҸҜд»ҘжЈҖжҹҘдёӢи®ҫзҪ®жҳҜеҗҰз”ҹж•ҲдәҶпјҢеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮжЈҖжҹҘдёӢйқўиҜ·жұӮе“Қеә”дёӯзҡ„ mlockall еҖјпјҡ1GET _nodes?filter_path=**.mlockall еҰӮжһңдҪ зңӢеҲ° mlockall жҳҜ falseпјҢйӮЈиҜҙжҳҺзҰҒжӯўеҶ…еӯҳдәӨжҚўеӨұиҙҘдәҶгҖӮе№¶дё”ж—Ҙеҝ—йҮҢдјҡзңӢеҲ°зұ»дјјдёӢйқўзҡ„иҜқпјҡUnable to lock JVM Memory. жңҖеҸҜиғҪзҡ„еҺҹеӣ жҳҜпјҢеңЁLinux/Unixж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹпјҢз”ЁжҲ·иҝҗиЎҢзҡ„ElasticsearchжІЎжңүй”Ғе®ҡеҶ…еӯҳзҡ„жқғйҷҗгҖӮеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮдёӢйқўзҡ„ж–№жі•жқҘи§ЈеҶіпјҡ дҪҝз”Ё .zip е’Ң .tar.gz иҝҷз§Қе®үиЈ…еҢ…ж—¶пјҢеңЁ /etc/security/limits.conf ж–Үд»¶дёӯи®ҫзҪ® memlock дёә unlimitedгҖӮ е…¶д»–ж–№ејҸе°ұдёҚзҝ»иҜ‘дәҶгҖӮ RPM and DebianSet MAX_LOCKED_MEMORY to unlimited in the system configuration file (or see below for systems using systemd).Systems using systemdSet LimitMEMLOCK to infinity in the systemd configuration. иҝҳжңүдёҖз§Қ mlockall еҸҜиғҪеӨұиҙҘзҡ„жғ…еҶөжҳҜдёҙж—¶ж–Үд»¶еӨ№пјҲйҖҡеёёжҳҜ /tmp пјүжҢӮиҪҪж—¶и®ҫе®ҡдәҶ noexec йҖүйЎ№гҖӮиҝҷз§Қжғ…еҶөеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮжҢҮе®ҡдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„дёҙж—¶ж–Үд»¶еӨ№жқҘи§ЈеҶіпјҢдҪҝз”Ё ES_JAVA_OPTS зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјҡ12export ES_JAVA_OPTS="$ES_JAVA_OPTS -Djava.io.tmpdir=/path/to/temp/dir"./bin/elasticsearch жҲ–иҖ…еңЁ jvm.options й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶йҮҢи®ҫзҪ®гҖӮ зҰҒжӯўжүҖжңүж–Үд»¶дәӨжҚўз¬¬дәҢз§ҚзҰҒжӯўеҶ…еӯҳдәӨжҚўзҡ„ж–№ејҸжҳҜе®Ңе…ЁзҰҒжӯўдәӨжҚўгҖӮйҖҡеёё Elasticsearch жҳҜдёҖеҸ°жңҚеҠЎеҷЁе”ҜдёҖиҝҗиЎҢзҡ„жңҚеҠЎпјҢе®ғзҡ„еҶ…еӯҳдҪҝз”Ёиў«JVMжҺ§еҲ¶зқҖпјҢжүҖд»ҘжІЎжңүеҝ…иҰҒе…Ғи®ёдәӨжҚўгҖӮ еңЁ Linux зі»з»ҹдҪ еҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮиҝҗиЎҢд»ҘдёӢд»Јз ҒзҰҒжӯўеҶ…еӯҳдәӨжҚўпјҡ1sudo swapoff -a еҰӮжһңиҰҒж°ёд№…зҰҒз”ЁпјҢеҲҷйңҖиҰҒзј–иҫ‘ /etc/fstab ж–Үд»¶пјҢз„¶еҗҺжіЁйҮҠжҺүжүҖжңүеҢ…еҗ« swap зҡ„иЎҢгҖӮ еңЁ Windows зі»з»ҹеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮзі»з»ҹеұһжҖ§ вҶ’ й«ҳзә§зі»з»ҹи®ҫзҪ® вҶ’ жҖ§иғҪ вҶ’ й«ҳзә§йҖүйЎ№еҚЎ вҶ’ иҷҡжӢҹеҶ…еӯҳ з„¶еҗҺи®ҫзҪ®дёәж— еҲҶйЎөж–Үд»¶гҖӮпјҲWindows 7пјү 3.4 ж–Үд»¶жҸҸиҝ°з¬ҰиҝҷдёӘи®ҫзҪ®еҸӘй’ҲеҜ№ Linux е’Ң macOS ж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹпјҢеҰӮжһңиҝҗиЎҢеңЁ Windows зі»з»ҹеҲҷеҸҜд»Ҙе®үе…Ёзҡ„иў«еҝҪз•ҘгҖӮ Elasticsearch дҪҝз”ЁдәҶеӨ§йҮҸзҡ„ж–Үд»¶жҸҸиҝ°з¬ҰжҲ–иҖ…ж–Үд»¶еҸҘжҹ„гҖӮж–Үд»¶жҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұе°ҶиҰҒиў«з”Ёе®Ңж—¶дјҡеҜјиҮҙзҒҫйҡҫжҖ§зҡ„еҗҺжһңпјҢе№¶дё”йқһеёёеҸҜиғҪеј•иө·ж•°жҚ®дёўеӨұгҖӮзЎ®дҝқеўһеҠ иҝҗиЎҢ Elasticsearch зҡ„з”ЁжҲ·жү“ејҖж–Үд»¶жҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұзҡ„ж•°йҮҸиҮіе°‘дёә65,536жҲ–иҖ…жӣҙй«ҳгҖӮ еҜ№дәҺ .zip е’Ң .tar.gz е®үиЈ…еҢ…пјҢеңЁеҗҜеҠЁ Elasticsearch еүҚд»Ҙrootиә«д»Ҫи®ҫзҪ®ulimit -n 65536пјҢжҲ–иҖ…дҝ®ж”№ /etc/security/limits.conf ж–Үд»¶пјҢи®ҫзҪ® nofile еҸӮж•°дёә65536жҲ–жӣҙй«ҳгҖӮ RPM е’Ң Debian зҡ„е®үиЈ…еҢ…е·Із»Ҹи®ҫзҪ®дәҶй»ҳи®ӨжңҖеӨ§ж–Үд»¶жҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұж•°дёә65536пјҢдёҚйңҖиҰҒйўқеӨ–й…ҚзҪ®гҖӮ дҪ еҸҜд»ҘжЈҖжҹҘжҜҸдёӘиҠӮзӮ№зҡ„ max_file_descriptors й…ҚзҪ®жғ…еҶөпјҡ1GET _nodes/stats/process?filter_path=**.max_file_descriptors 3.5 иҷҡжӢҹеҶ…еӯҳElasticsearch й»ҳи®ӨдҪҝз”ЁдёҖдёӘ hybrid mmapfs/niofs жқҘеӯҳеӮЁе®ғзҡ„зҙўеј•гҖӮж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹй»ҳи®ӨйҷҗеҲ¶зҡ„еҶ…еӯҳжҳ е°„ж•°жҳҜжҜ”иҫғдҪҺзҡ„пјҢеҸҜиғҪдјҡеј•иө·еҶ…еӯҳжәўеҮәејӮеёёгҖӮ еңЁ LinuxпјҢдҪ еҸҜд»Ҙз”Ё root иә«д»ҪйҖҡиҝҮд»ҘдёӢе‘Ҫд»ӨжқҘеўһеҠ иҝҷдёӘйҷҗеҲ¶пјҡ1sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=262144 иҰҒжғіж°ёд№…зҡ„еўһеҠ  vm.max_map_count и®ҫзҪ®пјҢйңҖиҰҒзј–иҫ‘ /etc/sysctl.conf ж–Үд»¶гҖӮйҮҚеҗҜеҗҺйҖҡиҝҮпјҡ1sysctl vm.max_map_count жқҘжЈҖйӘҢи®ҫзҪ®жҳҜеҗҰз”ҹж•Ҳ RPM е’Ң Debianе®үиЈ…еҢ…е°ҶдјҡиҮӘеҠЁи®ҫзҪ®иҝҷдёӘй…ҚзҪ®гҖӮдёҚйңҖиҰҒйўқеӨ–зҡ„ж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ 3.6 зәҝзЁӢж•°Elasticsearch дҪҝз”ЁеӨҡдёӘзәҝзЁӢжұ жқҘиҝӣиЎҢдёҚеҗҢзұ»еһӢзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңгҖӮеҪ“йңҖиҰҒж—¶иғҪеӨҹеҲӣе»әж–°зәҝзЁӢжҳҜеҫҲйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„гҖӮзЎ®дҝқ Elasticsearch з”ЁжҲ·иғҪеҲӣе»әзҡ„зәҝзЁӢж•°жңҖе°‘дёә2048дёӘгҖӮ еҸҜд»ҘеңЁеҗҜеҠЁеүҚйҖҡиҝҮи®ҫзҪ® ulimit -u 2048пјҢжҲ–иҖ…еңЁ /etc/security/limits.conf ж–Үд»¶йҮҢи®ҫзҪ® nproc дёә2048гҖӮ

posts.text: Kibana жҳҜдёҖдёӘеҹәдәҺжөҸи§ҲеҷЁйЎөйқўзҡ„ Elasticsearch еүҚз«Ҝеұ•зӨәе·Ҙе…·гҖӮKibana е…ЁйғЁдҪҝз”Ё HTML иҜӯиЁҖе’Ң JavaScript зј–еҶҷзҡ„гҖӮKibana жҳҜдёҖдёӘдёә Logstash е’Ң ElasticSearch жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„ж—Ҙеҝ—еҲҶжһҗзҡ„ Web жҺҘеҸЈгҖӮеҸҜдҪҝз”Ёе®ғеҜ№ж—Ҙеҝ—иҝӣиЎҢй«ҳж•Ҳзҡ„жҗңзҙўгҖҒеҸҜи§ҶеҢ–гҖҒеҲҶжһҗзӯүеҗ„з§Қж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ 1гҖҒй…ҚзҪ®зј–иҫ‘1vi config/kibana.yml жҢүз…§иҰҒжұӮдҝ®ж”№дёә1elasticsearch.url: "http://192.168.56.101:9200" е…¶д»–йғЁеҲҶеҸӮж•°дёҚдҝ®ж”№ еҰӮжһңеҸӘе…Ғи®ёжң¬жңәеҸҜд»Ҙи®ҝй—®пјҢеңЁ kibana.yml дёӯеҠ е…Ҙпјҡ1host: "127.0.0.1" 2гҖҒеҗҜеҠЁkibana 5.2.1 еҸҜд»ҘеҚ•зӢ¬еҗҜеҠЁпјҢе‘Ҫд»Ө1bin/kibana еҗҺеҸ°иҝҗиЎҢ1nohup bin/kibana & и®ҝй—®http://localhost:5601

posts.text: еңЁpom.xmlеҠ е…ҘеҰӮдёӢеҶ…е®№12345<dependency> <groupId>org.mybatis.spring.boot</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis-spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>1.3.0</version></dependency> mybatis-config.xml123456789101112131415161718<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?><!DOCTYPE configuration PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Config 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-config.dtd"><configuration> <typeAliases> <typeAlias alias="Integer" type="java.lang.Integer"/> <typeAlias alias="Long" type="java.lang.Long"/> <typeAlias alias="HashMap" type="java.util.HashMap"/> <typeAlias alias="LinkedHashMap" type="java.util.LinkedHashMap"/> <typeAlias alias="ArrayList" type="java.util.ArrayList"/> <typeAlias alias="LinkedList" type="java.util.LinkedList"/> </typeAliases> <typeAliases> <package name="cn.tisson.wechat.job.pojo"/> </typeAliases> <mappers> <mapper resource="cn/tisson/wechat/job/mapper/UserMapper.xml"/> </mappers></configuration> жҲ–иҖ…дҪҝз”ЁеңЁapplication.ymlдёӯеҠ е…Ҙ12345mybatis: config-location: classpath:mybatis/mybatis-config.xml type-aliases-package: cn.tisson.wechat.job.pojo# mapper-locationsиҝҷдёӘй…ҚзҪ®еҸӮж•°д»…еҪ“mapper xmlдёҺmapper classдёҚеңЁеҗҢдёҖдёӘзӣ®еҪ•дёӢж—¶жңүж•ҲгҖӮжүҖд»ҘдёҖиҲ¬еҸҜд»ҘеҝҪз•ҘгҖӮ# mapper-locations: classpath:cn/tisson/wechat/job/mapper/*.xml еңЁMapperзұ»дёҠйқўдҪҝз”Ё @Mapper жіЁи§Ј1234@Mapperpublic interface UserMapper { long count(User user);} Mapper.xmlй…ҚзҪ®123456789101112131415<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?><!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd" ><mapper namespace="cn.tisson.wechat.job.mapper.UserMapper"> <resultMap id="BaseResultMap" type="cn.tisson.wechat.job.pojo.User"> <constructor> <arg column="ID" javaType="java.math.BigDecimal" jdbcType="DECIMAL"/> <arg column="AGE" javaType="java.math.BigDecimal" jdbcType="DECIMAL"/> <arg column="CITYID" javaType="java.math.BigDecimal" jdbcType="DECIMAL"/> </constructor> </resultMap> <select id="count" parameterType="cn.tisson.wechat.job.pojo.User" resultType="java.lang.Long"> select count(*) from user where cityid = #{user.cityid} </select></mapper>

posts.title: logbackеӨҡзҺҜеўғй…ҚзҪ®
posts.excerpt: application.yml й…ҚзҪ® profiles123spring: profiles: active: dev еңЁдҪҝз”Ё logback-spring.xml дёӯдҪҝз”Ё springProfile й…ҚзҪ®пјҢдҪҝз”Ё logback-spring.xml еҸҜд»ҘиҺ·еҫ—жӣҙеӨҡspring bootдёӘжҖ§еҢ–й…ҚзҪ®
posts.text: application.yml й…ҚзҪ® profiles123spring: profiles: active: dev еңЁдҪҝз”Ё logback-spring.xml дёӯдҪҝз”Ё springProfile й…ҚзҪ®пјҢдҪҝз”Ё logback-spring.xml еҸҜд»ҘиҺ·еҫ—жӣҙеӨҡspring bootдёӘжҖ§еҢ–й…ҚзҪ®123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!-- For assistance related to logback-translator or configuration --><!-- files in general, please contact the logback user mailing list --><!-- at http://www.qos.ch/mailman/listinfo/logback-user --><!-- --><!-- For professional support please see --><!-- http://www.qos.ch/shop/products/professionalSupport --><!-- --><configuration scan="true" scanPeriod="60 seconds" debug="false"> <property name="logger.charset" value="UTF-8"/> <property name="logger.path" value="${catalina.home}/logs"/> <property name="logger.pattern" value="[%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} %highlight(%-5p)] %yellow(%t) %cyan(%c.%M\\(%L\\)) | %m%n"/> <property name="logger.maxHistory" value="15"/> <!--&lt;!&ndash; https://logback.qos.ch/manual/layouts.html#coloring &ndash;&gt; &lt;!&ndash; еҪ©иүІж—Ҙеҝ—дҫқиө–зҡ„жёІжҹ“зұ» &ndash;&gt; <conversionRule conversionWord="clr" converterClass="org.springframework.boot.logging.logback.ColorConverter" /> <conversionRule conversionWord="wex" converterClass="org.springframework.boot.logging.logback.WhitespaceThrowableProxyConverter" /> <conversionRule conversionWord="wEx" converterClass="org.springframework.boot.logging.logback.ExtendedWhitespaceThrowableProxyConverter" /> &lt;!&ndash; еҪ©иүІж—Ҙеҝ—ж јејҸ &ndash;&gt; <property name="logger.pattern" value="${CONSOLE_LOG_PATTERN:-%clr([%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} %clr(${LOG_LEVEL_PATTERN:-%5p})]){faint} %clr(%c.%M\\(%L\\)){cyan} | %m%n}" />--> <springProfile name="dev"> <appender name="stdout" class="ch.qos.logback.core.ConsoleAppender"> <encoder charset="${logger.charset}"> <pattern>${logger.pattern}</pattern> </encoder> </appender> <root level="info"> <appender-ref ref="stdout"/> </root> </springProfile> <springProfile name="prod"> <appender name="stdout" class="ch.qos.logback.core.rolling.RollingFileAppender"> <File>${logger.path}/info.log</File> <encoder charset="${logger.charset}"> <pattern>${logger.pattern}</pattern> </encoder> <rollingPolicy class="ch.qos.logback.core.rolling.TimeBasedRollingPolicy"> <fileNamePattern> ${logger.path}/info.log.%d{yyyy.MM.dd} </fileNamePattern> <maxHistory>${logger.maxHistory}</maxHistory> </rollingPolicy> </appender> <root level="info"> <appender-ref ref="stdout"/> </root> </springProfile></configuration>

posts.title: spring boot е®ҡж—¶еҷЁ
posts.excerpt: еңЁpom.xmlдёӯеҠ е…Ҙ12345<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>1.5.2.RELEASE</version></dependency>
posts.text: еңЁpom.xmlдёӯеҠ е…Ҙ12345<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>1.5.2.RELEASE</version></dependency> е®ҡж—¶еҷЁзұ»12345678910111213@Componentpublic class ArticleSummaryScheduled { // зӯүеҗҢдәҺfixedRate @Scheduled(cron = "0/15 * * * * ?") // дёҠдёҖж¬ЎејҖе§Ӣжү§иЎҢж—¶й—ҙзӮ№д№ӢеҗҺ6sеҶҚж¬Ўжү§иЎҢ // @Scheduled(fixedRate = 6000) // дёҠдёҖж¬Ўжү§иЎҢе®ҢжҜ•ж—¶й—ҙзӮ№д№ӢеҗҺ6sеҶҚж¬Ўжү§иЎҢ // @Scheduled(fixedDelay = 6000) public void process() { System.out.println(new Date()); }} еңЁmainж–№жі•зұ»дёҠйқўдҪҝз”Ё @EnableScheduling жіЁи§Ј12345678@SpringBootApplication// е®ҡж—¶еҷЁеҗҜеҠЁзұ»@EnableSchedulingpublic class Application { public static void main(String[] args) { SpringApplication.run(Application.class, args); }} еҸӘиҰҒдёҠйқўзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®пјҢе°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҗҜеҠЁдёҖдёӘе®ҡж—¶еҷЁдәҶ

posts.title: CentOS 7 FirewallйҳІзҒ«еўҷй…ҚзҪ®
posts.excerpt: дёҖгҖҒfirewallд»Ӣз»ҚCentOS 7дёӯйҳІзҒ«еўҷжҳҜдёҖдёӘйқһеёёзҡ„ејәеӨ§зҡ„еҠҹиғҪпјҢеҜ№CentOS 6.5дёӯзҡ„iptablesйҳІзҒ«еўҷиҝӣиЎҢдәҶеҚҮзә§дәҶгҖӮ дәҢгҖҒfirewallй…ҚзҪ®1гҖҒзі»з»ҹй…ҚзҪ®зӣ®еҪ•1/usr/lib/firewalld/services зӣ®еҪ•дёӯеӯҳж”ҫе®ҡд№үеҘҪзҡ„зҪ‘з»ңжңҚеҠЎе’Ңз«ҜеҸЈеҸӮж•°пјҢзі»з»ҹеҸӮж•°пјҢдёҚиғҪдҝ®ж”№гҖӮ 2гҖҒз”ЁжҲ·й…ҚзҪ®зӣ®еҪ•1/etc/firewalld/
posts.text: дёҖгҖҒfirewallд»Ӣз»ҚCentOS 7дёӯйҳІзҒ«еўҷжҳҜдёҖдёӘйқһеёёзҡ„ејәеӨ§зҡ„еҠҹиғҪпјҢеҜ№CentOS 6.5дёӯзҡ„iptablesйҳІзҒ«еўҷиҝӣиЎҢдәҶеҚҮзә§дәҶгҖӮ дәҢгҖҒfirewallй…ҚзҪ®1гҖҒзі»з»ҹй…ҚзҪ®зӣ®еҪ•1/usr/lib/firewalld/services зӣ®еҪ•дёӯеӯҳж”ҫе®ҡд№үеҘҪзҡ„зҪ‘з»ңжңҚеҠЎе’Ңз«ҜеҸЈеҸӮж•°пјҢзі»з»ҹеҸӮж•°пјҢдёҚиғҪдҝ®ж”№гҖӮ 2гҖҒз”ЁжҲ·й…ҚзҪ®зӣ®еҪ•1/etc/firewalld/ 3гҖҒеҰӮдҪ•иҮӘе®ҡд№үж·»еҠ з«ҜеҸЈз”ЁжҲ·еҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮдҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶зҡ„ж–№ејҸж·»еҠ з«ҜеҸЈпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮе‘Ҫд»Өзҡ„ж–№ејҸж·»еҠ з«ҜеҸЈпјҢжіЁж„ҸпјҢдҝ®ж”№зҡ„еҶ…е®№дјҡеңЁ/etc/firewalld/зӣ®еҪ•дёӢзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёӯиҝҳдҪ“зҺ°гҖӮ 3.1гҖҒе‘Ҫд»Өзҡ„ж–№ејҸ1firewall-cmd --permanent --add-port=9527/tcp еҸӮж•°д»Ӣз»Қпјҡ1гҖҒfirewall-cmdпјҡжҳҜLinuxжҸҗдҫӣзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңfirewallзҡ„дёҖдёӘе·Ҙе…·2гҖҒвҖ“permanentпјҡиЎЁзӨәи®ҫзҪ®дёәжҢҒд№…3гҖҒвҖ“add-portпјҡж ҮиҜҶж·»еҠ зҡ„з«ҜеҸЈ еҸҰеӨ–пјҢfirewall дёӯжңү Zone зҡ„жҰӮеҝөпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙе°Ҷе…·дҪ“зҡ„з«ҜеҸЈеҲ¶е®ҡеҲ°е…·дҪ“зҡ„ zone й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дёӯгҖӮ дҫӢеҰӮпјҡж·»еҠ  8010 з«ҜеҸЈ1firewall-cmd --zone=public --permanent --add-port=8010/tcp --zone=publicжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„zoneдёәpublic ж·»еҠ и§„еҲҷ12345$ firewall-cmd --permanent \ --zone=public \ --add-rich-rule="rule family="ipv4" source \ address="192.168.0.4/24" \ service name="http" accept" еҲ йҷӨдёҠйқўй…ҚзҪ®зҡ„и§„еҲҷ12345$ firewall-cmd --permanent \ --zone=public \ --remove-rich-rule="rule family="ipv4" source \ address="192.168.0.4/24" \ service name="http" accept" You can check if the port has actually be opened by runningfirewall-cmd вҖ“zone= вҖ“query-port=80/tcpfirewall-cmd вҖ“zone= вҖ“query-service=http 3.2гҖҒж–Үд»¶зҡ„ж–№ејҸ123456789101112131415161718192021<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><zone> <short>Public</short> <description>For use in public areas. You do not trust the other computers on networks to not harm your computer. Only selected incoming connections are accepted.</description> <!-- ж”ҫйҖҡжҢҮе®ҡipпјҢжҢҮе®ҡз«ҜеҸЈгҖҒеҚҸи®® --> <rule family="ipv4"> <source address="192.168.56.101"/> <port protocol="udp" port="555"/> <accept/> </rule> <rule family="ipv4"> <source address="192.168.56.101"/> <port protocol="tcp" port="9200-9300"/> <accept/> </rule> <!-- ж”ҫйҖҡд»»ж„Ҹipи®ҝй—®жңҚеҠЎеҷЁзҡ„8081з«ҜеҸЈ --> <rule family="ipv4"> <port protocol="tcp" port="8081"/> <accept/> </rule></zone> дёҠиҝ°зҡ„дёҖдёӘй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶еҸҜд»ҘеҫҲеҘҪзҡ„зңӢеҮәпјҡ1231гҖҒж·»еҠ йңҖиҰҒзҡ„и§„еҲҷпјҢејҖж”ҫйҖҡжәҗipдёә192.168.56.101пјҢз«ҜеҸЈ555пјҢеҚҸи®®tcp2гҖҒејҖж”ҫйҖҡжәҗipдёә192.168.56.101пјҢз«ҜеҸЈ9200-9300пјҢеҚҸи®®tcp3гҖҒејҖж”ҫйҖҡжәҗipдёәд»»ж„ҸпјҢз«ҜеҸЈ8081пјҢеҚҸи®®tcp дёүгҖҒfirewallеёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Өеёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Өд»Ӣз»Қ1234567891011firewall-cmd --state ##жҹҘзңӢйҳІзҒ«еўҷзҠ¶жҖҒпјҢжҳҜеҗҰжҳҜrunningfirewall-cmd --reload ##йҮҚж–°иҪҪе…Ҙй…ҚзҪ®пјҢжҜ”еҰӮж·»еҠ и§„еҲҷд№ӢеҗҺпјҢйңҖиҰҒжү§иЎҢжӯӨе‘Ҫд»Өfirewall-cmd --get-zones ##еҲ—еҮәж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„zonefirewall-cmd --get-services ##еҲ—еҮәж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„жңҚеҠЎпјҢеңЁеҲ—иЎЁдёӯзҡ„жңҚеҠЎжҳҜж”ҫиЎҢзҡ„firewall-cmd --query-service ftp ##жҹҘзңӢftpжңҚеҠЎжҳҜеҗҰж”ҜжҢҒпјҢиҝ”еӣһyesжҲ–иҖ…nofirewall-cmd --add-service=ftp ##дёҙж—¶ејҖж”ҫftpжңҚеҠЎfirewall-cmd --add-service=ftp --permanent ##ж°ёд№…ејҖж”ҫftpжңҚеҠЎfirewall-cmd --remove-service=ftp --permanent ##ж°ёд№…з§»йҷӨftpжңҚеҠЎfirewall-cmd --add-port=80/tcp --permanent ##ж°ёд№…ж·»еҠ 80з«ҜеҸЈ iptables -L -n ##жҹҘзңӢи§„еҲҷпјҢиҝҷдёӘе‘Ҫд»ӨжҳҜе’Ңiptablesзҡ„зӣёеҗҢзҡ„man firewall-cmd ##жҹҘзңӢеё®еҠ© йҮҚеҗҜгҖҒе…ій—ӯгҖҒејҖеҗҜfirewalldжңҚеҠЎ123systemctl restart firewalld #йҮҚеҗҜsystemctl start firewalld #ејҖеҗҜsystemctl stop firewalld #е…ій—ӯ еӣӣгҖҒCentOSеҲҮжҚўдёәiptablesйҳІзҒ«еўҷжң¬иҠӮз•Ҙ

posts.title: CentOSе®үиЈ…JDK
posts.excerpt: 1гҖҒеҮҶеӨҮеҲӣе»әзӣ®еҪ•12$ mkdir /usr/java$ cd /usr/java дёӢиҪҪ jdk-8u73-linux-x64.tar.gzпјҢи§ЈеҺӢ1$ tar -zxvf jdk-8u73-linux-x64.tar.gz дјҡи§ЈеҺӢеҲ° /usr/java/jdk1.8.0_73 дёӢ
posts.text: 1гҖҒеҮҶеӨҮеҲӣе»әзӣ®еҪ•12$ mkdir /usr/java$ cd /usr/java дёӢиҪҪ jdk-8u73-linux-x64.tar.gzпјҢи§ЈеҺӢ1$ tar -zxvf jdk-8u73-linux-x64.tar.gz дјҡи§ЈеҺӢеҲ° /usr/java/jdk1.8.0_73 дёӢ 2гҖҒй…ҚзҪ®зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸ(дёӨз§Қж–№ејҸдәҢйҖүдёҖй…ҚзҪ®еҚіеҸҜ)2.1 зј–иҫ‘ /etc/profile ж–Үд»¶дҝ®ж”№ /etc/profile ж–Үд»¶еҪ“жң¬жңәд»…д»…дҪңдёәејҖеҸ‘дҪҝз”Ёж—¶жҺЁиҚҗдҪҝз”Ёиҝҷз§Қж–№жі•пјҢеӣ дёәжӯӨз§Қй…ҚзҪ®ж—¶жүҖжңүз”ЁжҲ·зҡ„ shell йғҪжңүжқғдҪҝз”ЁиҝҷдәӣзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјҢеҸҜиғҪдјҡз»ҷзі»з»ҹеёҰжқҘе®үе…ЁжҖ§й—®йўҳгҖӮ1$ vi /etc/profile еўһеҠ еҰӮдёӢеҶ…е®№123export JAVA_HOME=/usr/java/jdkexport PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATHexport CLASSPATH=.:$JAVA_HOME/lib/dt.jar:$JAVA_HOME/lib/tools.jar:$CLASSPATH дҝқеӯҳйҖҖеҮә :wq12$ . /etc/profile$ echo $JAVA_HOME 2.2 зј–иҫ‘з”ЁжҲ·зӣ®еҪ•дёӢзҡ„ .bash_profileдҝ®ж”№ .bash_profile ж–Үд»¶иҝҷз§Қж–№жі•жӣҙдёәе®үе…ЁпјҢе®ғеҸҜд»ҘжҠҠдҪҝз”ЁиҝҷдәӣзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸзҡ„жқғйҷҗжҺ§еҲ¶еҲ°з”ЁжҲ·зә§еҲ«пјҢеҰӮжһңйңҖиҰҒз»ҷжҹҗдёӘз”ЁжҲ·жқғйҷҗдҪҝз”ЁиҝҷдәӣзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјҢеҸӘйңҖиҰҒдҝ®ж”№е…¶дёӘдәәз”ЁжҲ·дё»зӣ®еҪ•дёӢзҡ„ .bash_profile ж–Үд»¶е°ұеҸҜд»ҘдәҶ123export JAVA_HOME=/usr/java/jdkexport PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATHexport CLASSPATH=.:$JAVA_HOME/lib/dt.jar:$JAVA_HOME/lib/tools.jar:$CLASSPATH з„¶еҗҺжү§иЎҢдҪҝд№Ӣз”ҹж•Ҳ1source .bash_profile еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ° JAVA_HOME дёҚжҳҜжҢҮеҗ‘зңҹе®һзҡ„ jdk зӣ®еҪ• /usr/java/jdk1.8.0_73пјҢиҖҢжҳҜжҢҮеҗ‘ /usr/java/jdk 3гҖҒеҲӣе»әиҪҜй“ҫжҺҘдёәjdkзңҹе®һзӣ®еҪ•еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘе‘ҪеҗҚжӣҙеҠ й—ҙжҙҒеҝ«жҚ·ж–№ејҸ123$ ln -s /usr/java/jdk1.8.0_73 /usr/java/jdk$ source /etc/profile#$ source .bash_profile иҮіжӯӨпјҢй…ҚзҪ®е®ҢжҲҗ

posts.title: Linuxе®үиЈ…FTP
posts.text: Linuxе®үиЈ…FTPubuntuејҖеҗҜftpжңҚеҠЎе®үиЈ…vsftpd1гҖҒжү“ејҖвҖқз»Ҳз«ҜзӘ—еҸЈвҖқпјҢиҫ“е…ҘвҖқsudo apt-get install vsftpdвҖқвҖ“>еӣһиҪҰвҖ“>е®үиЈ…е®ҢжҲҗгҖӮ 2гҖҒеҲӨж–ӯvsftpdжҳҜеҗҰе®үиЈ…жҲҗеҠҹжү“ејҖвҖқз»Ҳз«ҜзӘ—еҸЈвҖқпјҢиҫ“е…ҘвҖқsudo service vsftpd restartвҖқйҮҚеҗҜvsftpdжңҚеҠЎвҖ“>еӣһиҪҰвҖ“>vsftpdеӨ„дәҺиҝҗиЎҢзҠ¶жҖҒпјҢиҜҙжҳҺе®үиЈ…жҲҗеҠҹгҖӮ 3гҖҒдҪҝз”Ёgeditдҝ®ж”№й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶/etc/vsftpd.confжү“ејҖвҖқз»Ҳз«ҜзӘ—еҸЈвҖқпјҢиҫ“е…ҘвҖқsudo gedit /etc/vsftpd.confвҖқвҖ“>еӣһиҪҰвҖ“>жү“ејҖдәҶvsftpd.confж–Үи®ҫзҪ®пјҡwrite_enable=YES ubuntuејҖеҗҜSSHжңҚеҠЎSSHеҲҶе®ўжҲ·з«Ҝopenssh-clientе’Ңopenssh-serverеҰӮжһңдҪ еҸӘжҳҜжғізҷ»йҷҶеҲ«зҡ„жңәеҷЁзҡ„SSHеҸӘйңҖиҰҒе®үиЈ…openssh-clientпјҲubuntuжңүй»ҳи®Өе®үиЈ…пјҢеҰӮжһңжІЎжңүеҲҷsudo apt-get install openssh-clientпјүпјҢеҰӮжһңиҰҒдҪҝжң¬жңәејҖж”ҫSSHжңҚеҠЎе°ұйңҖиҰҒе®үиЈ…openssh-serversudo apt-get install openssh-serverз„¶еҗҺзЎ®и®ӨsshserverжҳҜеҗҰеҗҜеҠЁдәҶпјҡps -e |grep sshеҰӮжһңзңӢеҲ°sshdйӮЈиҜҙжҳҺssh-serverе·Із»ҸеҗҜеҠЁдәҶгҖӮеҰӮжһңжІЎжңүеҲҷеҸҜд»Ҙиҝҷж ·еҗҜеҠЁпјҡsudo /etc/init.d/ssh startssh-serverй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶дҪҚдәҺ/ etc/ssh/sshd_configпјҢеңЁиҝҷйҮҢеҸҜд»Ҙе®ҡд№үSSHзҡ„жңҚеҠЎз«ҜеҸЈпјҢй»ҳи®Өз«ҜеҸЈжҳҜ22пјҢдҪ еҸҜд»ҘиҮӘе·ұе®ҡд№үжҲҗе…¶д»–з«ҜеҸЈеҸ·пјҢеҰӮ222гҖӮз„¶еҗҺйҮҚеҗҜSSHжңҚеҠЎпјҡsudo /etc/init.d/ssh stopsudo /etc/init.d/ssh startз„¶еҗҺдҪҝз”Ёд»ҘдёӢж–№ејҸзҷ»йҷҶSSHпјҡssh username@192.168.1.112 usernameдёә192.168.1.112 жңәеҷЁдёҠзҡ„з”ЁжҲ·пјҢйңҖиҰҒиҫ“е…ҘеҜҶз ҒгҖӮж–ӯејҖиҝһжҺҘпјҡexit жңҖиҝ‘дёҖзӣҙеңЁUbuntuдёӢз”Ёз»Ҳз«Ҝж“ҚдҪңпјҢзңӢзқҖд»–й•ҝй•ҝзҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„еҗҚе®һеңЁдёҚзҲҪпјҢ еҠЁжүӢжқҘж”№ж”№е’ҜпҪһ$: sudo gedit ~/.bashrcиҝҷдёӘж–Үд»¶и®°еҪ•дәҶз”ЁжҲ·з»Ҳз«Ҝй…ҚзҪ®жүҫеҲ°if [ вҖң$color_prompt вҖң = yes ]; then PS1 =вҖҷ${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}[\033[01;32m]\u@\h[\033[00m]:[\033[01;34m]\W [\033[00m]\$ вҖҳelse PS1 =вҖҷ${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}\u@\h:\W \$ вҖҳе°Ҷи“қиүІзҡ„wз”ұе°ҸеҶҷж”№жҲҗеӨ§еҶҷпјҢеҸҜд»ҘиЎЁзӨәеҸӘжҳҫзӨәеҪ“еүҚзӣ®еҪ•еҗҚз§°.
